items.title: Dexmedetomidine inhibits microglia ferroptosis to relieve postoperative cognitive dysfunction in elderly rats through JPX/HIF-1/DHODH pathway.
items.authors: Yunfei Wang; Feng Ouyang; Run Feng; Zhe Ding; Jiafang Wang
items.abstract: BACKGROUND: Postoperative cognitive dysfunction (POCD) is a prevalent neurological consequence in aged patients, with neuroinflammation and ferroptosis implicated in its pathogenesis. This study investigates whether dexmedetomidine (DEX) alleviates POCD by modulating the JPX/HIF-1α/DHODH axis. METHOD: Aged Sprague-Dawley rats received excision of the right common carotid artery to establish POCD. DEX (12 μg/kg) was administered preoperatively. Cognitive performance was evaluated through behavioral paradigms including spatial navigation tasks (Morris water maze) and recognition memory assessments (novel object test). Hippocampal ferroptosis markers (Fe2⁺, MDA, SOD, GSH) and protein levels (SLC7A11, GPX4, Iba1) were measured. BV-2 microglial cells were subjected to LPS treatment in vitro to induce neuroinflammation. RNA immunoprecipitation, chromatin immunoprecipitation, and dual-luciferase assays were performed to validate JPX/HIF-1α/DHODH interactions. Rescue assays were used to verify the role of JPX/HIF-1α/DHODH axis on ferroptosis of BV-2 cells. RESULT: DEX ameliorated cognitive deficits and suppressed hippocampal ferroptosis. Mechanistically, JPX recruits HIF-1α to transcriptionally activate DHODH expression, while DEX upregulated JPX to facilitate HIF-1α-mediated DHODH transcription. In BV-2 cells, DEX attenuated LPS-induced ferroptosis, whereas JPX silencing abolished its effects. DHODH overexpression counteracted siJPX's exacerbation of ferroptosis. CONCLUSION: DEX alleviates POCD by inhibiting microglial ferroptosis via the JPX/HIF-1α/DHODH axis, providing a novel therapeutic target for POCD intervention.

items.title_cn: 右美托咪定通过 JPX/HIF-1/DHODH 通路抑制小胶质细胞铁死亡，缓解老年大鼠术后认知功能障碍。
items.abstract_cn: 背景：术后认知功能障碍（POCD）是老年患者常见的神经系统后果，其发病机制涉及神经炎症和铁死亡。本研究探讨右美托咪定 (DEX) 是否通过调节 JPX/HIF-1α/DHODH 轴来缓解 POCD。方法：老年 Sprague-Dawley 大鼠接受右颈总动脉切除以建立 POCD。术前给予 DEX (12 μg/kg)。通过行为范式评估认知表现，包括空间导航任务（莫里斯水迷宫）和识别记忆评估（新物体测试）。测量海马铁死亡标志物（Fe2+、MDA、SOD、GSH）和蛋白质水平（SLC7A11、GPX4、Iba1）。 BV-2小胶质细胞在体外接受LPS处理以诱导神经炎症。进行 RNA 免疫沉淀、染色质免疫沉淀和双荧光素酶测定来验证 JPX/HIF-1α/DHODH 相互作用。救援实验用于验证 JPX/HIF-1α/DHODH 轴对 BV-2 细胞铁死亡的作用。结果：DEX 改善认知缺陷并抑制海马铁死亡。从机制上讲，JPX 招募 HIF-1α 来转录激活 DHODH 表达，而 DEX 上调 JPX 以促进 HIF-1α 介导的 DHODH 转录。在 BV-2 细胞中，DEX 减弱了 LPS 诱导的铁死亡，而 JPX 沉默则消除了其作用。 DHODH 过表达可以抵消 siJPX 铁死亡的加剧。结论：DEX通过JPX/HIF-1α/DHODH轴抑制小胶质细胞铁死亡，从而缓解POCD，为POCD干预提供新的治疗靶点。

items.title: Sericin improves diabetic cognitive impairment in rats by inhibiting TXNIP/NLRP3 neuroinflammation through SIRT1.
items.authors: Dan Yi; Xiya Lang; Jinyue Li; Haichen Cui; Yixin Ye; Yiyi Ling; Yuanzhao Zhou; Shuijing Chen
items.abstract: This study aimed to examine the effects of sericin on diabetic cognitive impairment (DCI) in rats based on neuroinflammation. SD rats were first fed with a high sugar and high fat diet for 4 weeks, and then injected with 50 mg/kg streptozotocin intraperitoneally to establish a diabetic model. The diabetic rats were randomly divided into 3 groups and treated with distilled water (n = 10), 500 mg/kg (n = 10), or 1000 mg/kg (n = 20) sericin, respectively, by gavage once a day for 8 weeks. Before the end of the trial, 10 rats in the 1000 mg/kg sericin group were injected with 10 μg EX527, a Sirtuin-1 (SIRT1) inhibitor, into the lateral ventricles once every other day for 5 times. Treated with sericin significantly reduced fasting blood glucose and improved DCI in rats. Sericin significantly inhibited neuroinflammation and microglial activation, reduced the expression of NOD-like receptor protein 3 (NLRP3) and thioredoxin-interacting protein (TXNIP) proteins, and reduced cell apoptosis, while increasing the expression of SIRT1 protein in the hippocampus of diabetic rats. After inhibiting SIRT1 with EX527, the above effect of sericin on DCI rats was weakened. These results indicated that sericin may block DCI progression in rats by inhibiting TXNIP/NLRP3 neuroinflammation and neuronal apoptosis through SIRT1.
items.title_en: Sericin improves diabetic cognitive impairment in rats by inhibiting TXNIP/NLRP3 neuroinflammation through SIRT1.
items.title_cn: 丝胶通过 SIRT1 抑制 TXNIP/NLRP3 神经炎症，从而改善大鼠糖尿病认知障碍。
items.abstract_cn: 本研究旨在基于神经炎症研究丝胶对大鼠糖尿病认知障碍（DCI）的影响。首先给予SD大鼠高糖、高脂饲料喂养4周，然后腹腔注射50 mg/kg链脲佐菌素建立糖尿病模型。将糖尿病大鼠随机分为3组，分别用蒸馏水（n = 10）、500 mg/kg（n = 10）或1000 mg/kg（n = 20）丝胶灌胃，每天一次，连续8周。试验结束前，1000 mg/kg丝胶组10只大鼠侧脑室注射10 μg Sirtuin-1（SIRT1）抑制剂EX527，隔日一次，共5次。用丝胶处理可显着降低大鼠的空腹血糖并改善 DCI。丝胶显着抑制神经炎症和小胶质细胞活化，降低糖尿病大鼠海马NOD样受体蛋白3（NLRP3）和硫氧还蛋白相互作用蛋白（TXNIP）蛋白的表达，减少细胞凋亡，同时增加SIRT1蛋白的表达。用EX527抑制SIRT1后，丝胶对DCI大鼠的上述作用减弱。这些结果表明，丝胶可能通过 SIRT1 抑制 TXNIP/NLRP3 神经炎症和神经元凋亡，从而阻断大鼠 DCI 进展。

items.title: Oxytocin alleviates the cognitive and memory dysfunction caused by neuroinflammation through blocking the TLR4/NLRP3/NF-κB signaling pathway.
items.authors: Haodong Gong; Yihan Wang; Yichao Ou; Mingfeng Zhou; Guangsen Wu; Mengjie Che; Kai Li; Rongjun Chen
items.abstract: Lipopolysaccharide (LPS)-induced systemic inflammation is associated with cognitive and memory impairments, neuroinflammation, and synaptic dysfunction. The neuropeptide oxytocin has anti-inflammatory and neuromodulatory properties; however, the underlying molecular mechanisms remain poorly understood. This study aimed to investigate the role of oxytocin in LPS-induced deficits in spatial learning, memory, and social recognition and explore the underlying mechanisms related to neuroinflammatory suppression and synaptic restoration. Adult male C57BL/6 mice were intraperitoneally injected with LPS, with or without oxytocin and the oxytocin receptor antagonist atosiban, and subjected to behavioral assessments, including the Morris water maze, three-chamber social interaction test, open field test, and elevated plus maze. LPS administration impaired social and spatial memory without affecting anxiety-related behaviors. These impairments were associated with elevated levels of pro-inflammatory cytokines interleukin-1β (IL-1β), interleukin-6 (IL-6), tumor necrosis factor alpha (TNF-α) in the serum and hippocampus, increased microglial activation, and downregulated synaptic proteins (postsynaptic density protein 95 (PSD-95), synaptosomal-associated protein 25 (SNAP-25), and synaptophysin). LPS decreased circulating oxytocin levels and the number of oxytocinergic neurons in the hypothalamus while upregulating hippocampal oxytocin receptor expression. Exogenous oxytocin administration ameliorated LPS-induced cognitive deficits, reduced neuroinflammation, and restored synaptic protein expression, which were reversed by atosiban co-administration. Pharmacological inhibition of the nucleotide-binding oligomerization domain-like receptor thermal protein domain-associated protein 3 (NLRP3) inflammasome using MCC950 mimicked the protective effects of oxytocin, whereas its activation using nigericin abolished them. These findings suggest that oxytocin alleviates LPS-induced cognitive and synaptic impairments by suppressing NLRP3 inflammasome-mediated neuroinflammation, highlighting its therapeutic potential in inflammation-associated cognitive dysfunction.
items.title_en: Oxytocin alleviates the cognitive and memory dysfunction caused by neuroinflammation through blocking the TLR4/NLRP3/NF-κB signaling pathway.
items.title_cn: 催产素通过阻断TLR4/NLRP3/NF-κB信号通路来缓解神经炎症引起的认知和记忆功能障碍。
items.abstract_cn: 脂多糖 (LPS) 诱导的全身炎症与认知和记忆障碍、神经炎症和突触功能障碍有关。神经肽催产素具有抗炎和神经调节特性；然而，人们对潜在的分子机制仍知之甚少。本研究旨在探讨催产素在脂多糖诱导的空间学习、记忆和社会识别缺陷中的作用，并探讨与神经炎症抑制和突触恢复相关的潜在机制。成年雄性C57BL/6小鼠腹腔注射LPS，加或不加催产素和催产素受体拮抗剂阿托西班，并进行行为评估，包括Morris水迷宫、三室社交互动测试、旷场测试和高架十字迷宫。 LPS 给药会损害社交和空间记忆，但不会影响焦虑相关行为。这些损伤与血清和海马中促炎细胞因子白细胞介素-1β (IL-1β)、白介素-6 (IL-6)、肿瘤坏死因子 α (TNF-α) 水平升高、小胶质细胞活化增加以及突触蛋白下调（突触后密度蛋白 95 (PSD-95)、突触体相关蛋白 25 (SNAP-25) 和突触体相关蛋白 25 (SNAP-25)）相关。突触素）。 LPS 降低循环催产素水平和下丘脑催产素能神经元的数量，同时上调海马催产素受体的表达。外源性催产素给药可改善 LPS 诱导的认知缺陷，减少神经炎症，并恢复突触蛋白表达，而与阿托西班联合给药可逆转这些情况。使用 MCC950 对核苷酸结合寡聚化结构域样受体热蛋白结构域相关蛋白 3 (NLRP3) 炎症小体的药理抑制模仿了催产素的保护作用，而使用尼日利亚霉素激活则消除了这种保护作用。这些发现表明，催产素通过抑制 NLRP3 炎性体介导的神经炎症来减轻 LPS 诱导的认知和突触损伤，突出了其在炎症相关认知功能障碍中的治疗潜力。

items.title: Engineered Exosomal miR-146a-5p Reprograms BMSC Fate and Restores Mitochondrial Homeostasis in Glucocorticoid-Induced Osteonecrosis of Femoral Head.
items.authors: Zehui Lv; Xuejie Cai; Yiming Xu; Xingdong Yang; Ruoying Wang; Han Wang; Yixin Bian; Jiawei Xu
items.abstract: Glucocorticoid (GC)-induced osteonecrosis of the femoral head (ONFH) involves stem cell senescence, mitochondrial dysfunction, and impaired bone regeneration. However, the molecular basis linking GC stress to bone marrow stromal cell (BMSC) dysfunction remains unclear. Here, we identify miR-146a-5p as a key regulator of BMSC fate under GC exposure, through comprehensive transcriptomic analysis of clinical bone marrow samples from GC-induced ONFH patients. Exosomes engineered to deliver miR-146a-5p restored mitochondrial membrane potential, suppressed oxidative stress, and reactivated mitophagy by targeting the TRAF6-NF-κB axis. These exosomes reversed GC-induced senescence and enhanced osteogenic and angiogenic capacity in vitro and in vivo. In a rat ONFH model, intraosseous delivery of miR-146a-5p exosomes improved trabecular structure and vascularization. Single-cell RNA-seq revealed a shift toward osteogenic and immunomodulatory BMSC subtypes. Our findings demonstrate that miR-146a-5p-engineered exosomes rejuvenate skeletal regeneration by restoring mitochondrial homeostasis and inflammatory balance, offering a promising cell-free therapy for GC-associated ONFH.
items.title_en: Engineered Exosomal miR-146a-5p Reprograms BMSC Fate and Restores Mitochondrial Homeostasis in Glucocorticoid-Induced Osteonecrosis of Femoral Head.
items.title_cn: 工程外泌体 miR-146a-5p 重新编程 BMSC 命运并恢复糖皮质激素诱导的股骨头坏死中的线粒体稳态。
items.abstract_cn: 糖皮质激素 (GC) 诱导的股骨头坏死 (ONFH) 涉及干细胞衰老、线粒体功能障碍和骨再生受损。然而，GC 应激与骨髓基质细胞 (BMSC) 功能障碍之间的分子基础仍不清楚。在这里，我们通过对 GC 诱导的 ONFH 患者的临床骨髓样本进行全面转录组分析，确定 miR-146a-5p 是 GC 暴露下 BMSC 命运的关键调节因子。设计用于传递 miR-146a-5p 的外泌体可通过靶向 TRAF6-NF-κB 轴恢复线粒体膜电位、抑制氧化应激并重新激活线粒体自噬。这些外泌体逆转了GC诱导的衰老，并在体外和体内增强了成骨和血管生成能力。在大鼠 ONFH 模型中，骨内递送 miR-146a-5p 外泌体改善了小梁结构和血管化。单细胞 RNA 测序揭示了向成骨和免疫调节 BMSC 亚型的转变。我们的研究结果表明，miR-146a-5p 工程化的外泌体通过恢复线粒体稳态和炎症平衡来恢复骨骼再生，为 GC 相关 ONFH 提供了一种有前途的无细胞疗法。

items.title: Engineered mesenchymal stem cell-derived extracellular vesicles attenuate acute glaucoma-induced neuroinflammation by reprogramming microglial polarization.
items.authors: Aixiang Luo; Haiyang Yu; Tianqi Duan; Min Li; Ruping Zheng; Shuangyan He; Jufang Huang
items.abstract: Retinal microglia-mediated neuroinflammation is a critical driver of pathological damage in glaucoma, leading to irreversible loss of retinal ganglion cells (RGCs). Current treatments remain limited in effectively targeting and modulating this neuroinflammatory component within the retinal microenvironment. To address this, we engineered cRGD peptide-functionalized mesenchymal stem cell (MSC)-derived extracellular vesicles (cRGD-EVs) capable of actively targeting activated microglia for the localized delivery of anti-inflammatory miRNAs. After intravitreal administration, cRGD-EVs demonstrated enhanced accumulation in the retina and specific uptake by activated microglia in a rat model of retinal ischemia/reperfusion (RIR) injury. Both in vitro co-culture models and in vivo analyses confirmed the targeting efficacy and phenotypic reprogramming of microglia from a pro-inflammatory (M1) to an anti-inflammatory (M2) state. Intravitreal injection of cRGD-EVs loaded with key miRNAs (let-7c-5p, miR-21a-5p, and miR-146a-5p) significantly suppressed NF-κB pathway activation and reduced the expression of downstream pro-inflammatory cytokines. Treated animals exhibited notable preservation of retinal structure, increased RGC survival, and significant recovery of visual function, as measured by electroretinography. Furthermore, in acute ocular hypertension model, cRGD-EV treatment attenuated glaucomatous neurodegeneration and improved overall retinal homeostasis. These findings highlight cRGD-EVs as a promising targeted biologic delivery system for treating neuroinflammatory components of glaucoma and potentially other retinal diseases characterized by microglial activation.
items.title_en: Engineered mesenchymal stem cell-derived extracellular vesicles attenuate acute glaucoma-induced neuroinflammation by reprogramming microglial polarization.
items.title_cn: 工程间充质干细胞衍生的细胞外囊泡通过重新编程小胶质细胞极化来减轻急性青光眼诱导的神经炎症。
items.abstract_cn: 视网膜小胶质细胞介导的神经炎症是青光眼病理损伤的关键驱动因素，导致视网膜神经节细胞（RGC）不可逆转的损失。目前的治疗方法在有效靶向和调节视网膜微环境中的这种神经炎症成分方面仍然有限。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了 cRGD 肽功能化的间充质干细胞 (MSC) 衍生的细胞外囊泡 (cRGD-EV)，能够主动靶向激活的小胶质细胞，以局部递送抗炎 miRNA。玻璃体内给药后，cRGD-EVs 在视网膜缺血/再灌注 (RIR) 损伤的大鼠模型中显示出在视网膜中的积累增强以及激活的小胶质细胞的特异性摄取。体外共培养模型和体内分析均证实了小胶质细胞从促炎（M1）状态到抗炎（M2）状态的靶向功效和表型重编程。玻璃体内注射载有关键 miRNA（let-7c-5p、miR-21a-5p 和 miR-146a-5p）的 cRGD-EV 显着抑制 NF-κB 通路激活并减少下游促炎细胞因子的表达。通过视网膜电图检查，接受治疗的动物表现出视网膜结构的显着保存、RGC 存活率的增加以及视功能的显着恢复。此外，在急性高眼压模型中，cRGD-EV 治疗减轻了青光眼神经变性并改善了整体视网膜稳态。这些发现强调了 cRGD-EVs 作为一种有前途的靶向生物递送系统，用于治疗青光眼的神经炎症成分和潜在的其他以小胶质细胞激活为特征的视网膜疾病。

items.title: Ultrasound-guided HUC-MSCs transplantation alleviates neuropathic pain in CCI rats: a mechanistic study based on microglia/macrophage polarization and the NLRP3 inflammasome.
items.authors: Xiaodong Xu; Yubei Qiu; Chongjiu Fan; Ye Chen; Shishi Huang; Lei Lin; Huishu Wang; Yingzhen Lai
items.abstract: This study investigates the therapeutic effects of ultrasound-guided transplantation of human umbilical cord mesenchymal stem cells (HUC-MSCs) on nerve injury and neuronal recovery in chronic constriction injury (CCI) rats. Behavioral analysis showed that HUC-MSCs treatment significantly improved Paw Mechanical Withdrawal Threshold (PMWT) and Thermal Paw Withdrawal Latency (TWL), with faster recovery in the HUC-MSCs groups. Histological analysis revealed enhanced repair and regeneration, reduced inflammation, and improved results in the dual-treatment group (CCI + U2). Ultrasound and histological examination demonstrated significant nerve fiber repair, reduced inflammation, and enhanced myelin recovery, especially in the CCI + U2 group. TMT-based proteomics identified differential protein expression in the spinal dorsal horn (SDH), confirming molecular changes associated with neuronal recovery. Analysis of microglial polarization in the SDH, and macrophage polarization in the dorsal root ganglion (DRG) and sciatic nerve (SN), showed that HUC-MSCs promoted the M2 phenotype, reducing inflammation and enhancing repair. HUC-MSCs also modulated the NLRP3 inflammasome, lowering NLRP3, ASC, caspase-1, and IL-1β levels. The study further explored HUC-MSCs-derived exosomes' effects on microglial polarization and NLRP3 activity, regulated by miR-223-3p to promote anti-inflammatory and neuroprotective effects, suggesting the potential of HUC-MSCs and exosomes in nerve regeneration and neuroinflammation reduction after SN injury.
items.title_en: Ultrasound-guided HUC-MSCs transplantation alleviates neuropathic pain in CCI rats: a mechanistic study based on microglia/macrophage polarization and the NLRP3 inflammasome.
items.title_cn: 超声引导下的 HUC-MSC 移植可减轻 CCI 大鼠的神经性疼痛：基于小胶质细胞/巨噬细胞极化和 NLRP3 炎性体的机制研究。
items.abstract_cn: 本研究探讨超声引导下人脐带间充质干细胞（HUC-MSCs）移植对慢性缩窄性损伤（CCI）大鼠神经损伤和神经元恢复的治疗作用。行为分析表明，HUC-MSC 治疗显着改善了足爪机械缩足阈值 (PMWT) 和热足缩足潜伏期 (TWL)，并且 HUC-MSC 组的恢复速度更快。组织学分析显示，双治疗组 (CCI + U2) 的修复和再生得到增强，炎症减少，结果得到改善。超声和组织学检查显示显着的神经纤维修复、炎症减少和髓磷脂恢复增强，尤其是在 CCI + U2 组中。基于 TMT 的蛋白质组学鉴定了脊髓背角 (SDH) 中的差异蛋白表达，证实了与神经元恢复相关的分子变化。对 SDH 中小胶质细胞极化以及背根神经节 (DRG) 和坐骨神经 (SN) 中巨噬细胞极化的分析表明，HUC-MSC 促进 M2 表型，减少炎症并增强修复。 HUC-MSC 还调节 NLRP3 炎性体，降低 NLRP3、ASC、caspase-1 和 IL-1β 水平。该研究进一步探讨了 HUC-MSC 衍生的外泌体对小胶质细胞极化和 NLRP3 活性的影响，并受 miR-223-3p 调节，以促进抗炎和神经保护作用，表明 HUC-MSC 和外泌体在 SN 损伤后神经再生和减少神经炎症方面的潜力。

items.title: Optimization of polyethylene glycol-based isolation of exosomes from mesenchymal stem cells for regenerative medicine applications.
items.authors: Maryam Adelipour; Hyojin Hwang; Reham M Marzouk; Mohamed A Gab-Allah; Ga Seul Lee; Jeong Hee Moon; Kee K Kim; David M Lubman
items.abstract: BACKGROUND: Mesenchymal stem cells (MSCs) and their derived exosomes have gained significant attention in regenerative medicine due to their unique therapeutic properties, including immunomodulatory and regenerative capabilities. However, the development of a simple, scalable, and reproducible method for isolating exosomes from MSC-conditioned media remains a challenge. METHODS: We optimized a polyethylene glycol (PEG)-based precipitation method for exosome isolation by initially evaluating three different PEG molecular weights (1140, 3350, and 8000 Da). Protein quantification and nanoparticle tracking analysis (NTA) were performed for all three PEG types to assess yield and particle size. Based on these results, PEG 3350 and PEG 8000 were selected for further characterization by scanning electron microscopy (SEM), size exclusion chromatography (SEC), and Western blotting. Subsequently, proteomic and metabolomic analyses were conducted using exosomes isolated with PEG 3350. For functional assays, HeLa cells were exposed to increasing concentrations of MSC-derived exosomes under either 1% or 10% fetal bovine serum (FBS). Cell viability was evaluated at 24 h and 48 h using the the 3-(4,5-dimethylthiazol-2-yl)-5-(3-carboxymethoxyphenyl)-2-(4-sulfophenyl)-2H-tetrazolium (MTS) assay. RESULTS: Our results demonstrated that PEG 3350 provided the highest yield and purity of MSC-derived exosomes. The isolated exosomes exhibited an average size below 200 nm, as confirmed by SEM and NTA. Western blotting validated the presence of exosome-specific markers CD63, CD9, and LGALS3BP, while liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry (LC-MS/MS) analysis identified 357 proteins and 1,085 metabolites, confirming the molecular integrity of the exosomes. Additionally, SEC analysis revealed that repeated PEG-based enrichment cycles effectively improved exosome purity by removing non-vesicular contaminants. Functionally, exosomes isolated with PEG 3350 exhibited no cytotoxicity in HeLa cells and, at higher concentrations, promoted a condition-dependent increase in cell viability. CONCLUSIONS: This study presents an optimized PEG 3350-based method for exosome isolation, providing a scalable and reproducible approach for obtaining high-purity MSC-derived exosomes. These findings have significant implications for the development of exosome-based therapeutics in regenerative medicine.
items.title_en: Optimization of polyethylene glycol-based isolation of exosomes from mesenchymal stem cells for regenerative medicine applications.
items.title_cn: 优化基于聚乙二醇的间充质干细胞外泌体分离，用于再生医学应用。
items.abstract_cn: 背景：间充质干细胞（MSC）及其衍生的外泌体由于其独特的治疗特性（包括免疫调节和再生能力）而在再生医学领域获得了极大的关注。然而，开发一种简单、可扩展且可重复的方法来从 MSC 条件培养基中分离外泌体仍然是一个挑战。方法：我们通过初步评估三种不同的 PEG 分子量（1140、3350 和 8000 Da），优化了用于外泌体分离的基于聚乙二醇 (PEG) 的沉淀方法。对所有三种 PEG 类型进行蛋白质定量和纳米颗粒跟踪分析 (NTA)，以评估产量和粒径。根据这些结果，选择 PEG 3350 和 PEG 8000 通过扫描电子显微镜 (SEM)、尺寸排阻色谱 (SEC) 和蛋白质印迹进行进一步表征。随后，使用 PEG 3350 分离的外泌体进行蛋白质组学和代谢组学分析。为了进行功能测定，HeLa 细胞在 1% 或 10% 胎牛血清 (FBS) 下暴露于浓度不断增加的 MSC 衍生外泌体。使用 3-(4,5-二甲基噻唑-2-基)-5-(3-羧基甲氧基苯基)-2-(4-磺基苯基)-2H-四唑 (MTS) 测定法评估 24 小时和 48 小时的细胞活力。结果：我们的结果表明，PEG 3350 提供了最高产量和纯度的 MSC 衍生的外泌体。 SEM 和 NTA 证实，分离的外泌体平均尺寸低于 200 nm。蛋白质印迹验证了外泌体特异性标记物 CD63、CD9 和 LGALS3BP 的存在，而液相色谱-串联质谱 (LC-MS/MS) 分析鉴定了 357 种蛋白质和 1,085 种代谢物，证实了外泌体的分子完整性。此外，SEC 分析表明，重复的基于 PEG 的富集循环可通过去除非囊泡污染物有效提高外泌体纯度。从功能上讲，用 PEG 3350 分离的外泌体在 HeLa 细胞中没有表现出细胞毒性，并且在较高浓度下，可促进细胞活力的条件依赖性增加。结论：本研究提出了一种基于 PEG 3350 的优化外泌体分离方法，提供了一种……

items.title: Fibroblast depletion reveals mammalian epithelial resilience across neonatal and adult stages.
items.authors: Isabella M Gaeta; Shuangshuang Du; Clémentine Villeneuve; David G Gonzalez; Catherine Matte-Martone; Smirthy Ganesan; Deandra Simpson; Hilldana Tibebu
items.abstract: Regenerative organs, like the skin, depend on niche-stem cell interactions that sustain cellular turnover. In culture, skin fibroblasts promote epidermal stem cell proliferation and differentiation. Yet, it remains elusive how fibroblasts regulate epidermal stem cell behaviors and differentiation in vivo in skin. Here, we asked how fibroblast depletion may impact proliferation of the epidermal stem cell compartment. Surprisingly, we find that significant depletion of fibroblast density does not affect epidermal stem cell proliferation during adult or neonatal stages in vivo. These results demonstrate that across different ages, proliferation of epidermal stem cells can persist in the face of a depleted fibroblast population. Interestingly, neonatal fibroblast depletion does not significantly reduce collagen I density but affects basement membrane mechanics and epidermal stem cell delamination. Despite these changes, the skin continues to maintain its protective barrier function. Thus, our work demonstrates the skin regenerative program employs robust compensatory mechanisms in response to fibroblast depletion to maintain functional capacity.
items.title_en: Fibroblast depletion reveals mammalian epithelial resilience across neonatal and adult stages.
items.title_cn: 成纤维细胞耗竭揭示了哺乳动物在新生儿和成年阶段的上皮弹性。
items.abstract_cn: 再生器官，如皮肤，依赖于维持细胞更新的生态位干细胞相互作用。在培养中，皮肤成纤维细胞促进表皮干细胞增殖和分化。然而，成纤维细胞如何调节皮肤体内表皮干细胞的行为和分化仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们询问成纤维细胞耗竭如何影响表皮干细胞室的增殖。令人惊讶的是，我们发现成纤维细胞密度的显着减少并不影响体内成人或新生儿阶段的表皮干细胞增殖。这些结果表明，在不同的年龄段，面对成纤维细胞群的耗尽，表皮干细胞的增殖可以持续存在。有趣的是，新生儿成纤维细胞耗竭不会显着降低 I 型胶原蛋白密度，但会影响基底膜力学和表皮干细胞分层。尽管发生这些变化，皮肤仍继续保持其保护屏障功能。因此，我们的工作表明，皮肤再生程序采用强大的补偿机制来响应成纤维细胞耗竭，以维持功能能力。

核心发现：再生器官，如皮肤，依赖于维持细胞更新的生态位干细胞相互作用。在培养中，皮肤成纤维细胞促进表皮干细胞增殖和分化。然而，成纤维细胞如何调节皮肤体内表皮干细胞的行为和分化仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们询问成纤维细胞耗竭如何影响表皮干细胞室的增殖。令人惊讶的是，我们发现成纤维细胞密度的显着减少并不影响体内成人或新生儿阶段的表皮干细胞增殖。这些结果表明，在不同的年龄段，面对成纤维细胞群的耗尽，表皮干细胞的增殖可以持续存在。有趣的是，新生儿成纤维细胞耗竭不会显着降低 I 型胶原蛋白密度，但会影响基底膜力学和表皮干细胞分层。尽管发生这些变化，皮肤仍继续保持其保护屏障功能。因此，我们的工作表明，皮肤再生程序采用强大的补偿机制来响应成纤维细胞耗竭，以维持功能能力。

items.title: GPR124 Alleviates Blood-Brain Barrier Disruption by Enhancing Microvascular Endothelial Function after Traumatic Brain Injury.
items.authors: Chen Wang; Lin Cai; Qiuyuan Gong; Yang Yang; Yuqing Liang; Xinyu Niu; Lai Wei; Ze Liu
items.abstract: Traumatic brain injury (TBI) is a leading cause of death among young adults worldwide. However, the role of G protein-coupled receptor 124 (GPR124), a key regulator of the nervous system, in TBI remains unexplored. We employed a controlled cortical impact (CCI) model combined with single-cell RNA sequencing to analyze the localization of GPR124 expression following TBI. Additionally, we used mice with endothelial cell (EC)-specific conditional knockout (CKO) of GPR124 to perform behavioral experiments. A stretch injury (SI) model was also established to investigate the effects of GPR124 on ECs. Neurological recovery after TBI was significantly impaired in mice with the EC-specific CKO of GPR124. Furthermore, GPR124 knockdown reduced EC function after SI. Notably, tight junction integrity was disrupted both in vivo and in vitro after GPR124 knockdown. Mass spectrometry and immunoprecipitation analyses confirmed that GPR124 interacts with fibroblast growth factor binding protein-1, thereby activating the Wnt/β-catenin pathway. Our study demonstrates that GPR124 regulates microvascular endothelial function and maintains blood-brain barrier integrity by activating the Wnt/β-catenin pathway. This mechanism plays a crucial role in improving TBI prognosis and may represent a potential new therapeutic target.
items.title_en: GPR124 Alleviates Blood-Brain Barrier Disruption by Enhancing Microvascular Endothelial Function after Traumatic Brain Injury.
items.title_cn: GPR124 通过增强脑外伤后的微血管内皮功能来减轻血脑屏障破坏。
items.abstract_cn: 创伤性脑损伤（TBI）是全世界年轻人死亡的主要原因。然而，G 蛋白偶联受体 124 (GPR124)（神经系统的关键调节因子）在 TBI 中的作用仍未被探索。我们采用受控皮质影响 (CCI) 模型结合单细胞 RNA 测序来分析 TBI 后 GPR124 表达的定位。此外，我们使用 GPR124 的内皮细胞 (EC) 特异性条件敲除 (CKO) 小鼠来进行行为实验。还建立了拉伸损伤（SI）模型来研究 GPR124 对 EC 的影响。具有 EC 特异性 CKO GPR124 的小鼠 TBI 后的神经恢复明显受损。此外，GPR124 敲低降低了 SI 后的 EC 功能。值得注意的是，GPR124 敲低后，紧密连接完整性在体内和体外均被破坏。质谱和免疫沉淀分析证实 GPR124 与成纤维细胞生长因子结合蛋白-1 相互作用，从而激活 Wnt/β-catenin 通路。我们的研究表明，GPR124 通过激活 Wnt/β-catenin 通路来调节微血管内皮功能并维持血脑屏障完整性。这种机制在改善 TBI 预后方面发挥着至关重要的作用，并可能代表一个潜在的新治疗靶点。

items.title: Oxidized Phosphatidylcholines Inhibit Airway Smooth Muscle β2-Adrenergic Receptors via Protein Kinase C.
items.journal: American journal of respiratory cell and molecular biology
items.authors: Jignesh Vaghasiya; Anurag Sikarwar; Azadeh Dalvand; Sujata Basu; Alaina Bagan; Nathan Varghese; Angela A Duaqui; Dheerendra Pandey
items.abstract: Understanding mechanisms for β2 adrenergic receptor (β2AR) insensitivity in asthmatics is incomplete. We discovered that the accumulation of oxidized phosphatidylcholines (OxPC) in the lung correlates with airway hyperresponsiveness, and OxPC induce contraction and cytokine synthesis in human airway smooth muscle (ASM) cells. Here, we test whether OxPC impair β2AR agonist bronchodilator responses and related mechanism(s) for β2AR insensitivity. Using tracheal rings from BALB/c mice, we assayed the effects of oxidized 1-palmitoyl-2-arachidonoyl-sn-glycero-3-phosphocholine (OxPAPC) on β2AR agonist (isoproterenol (Iso))-induced relaxation of methacholine (MCh)-contracted airways. OxPAPC pre-exposure attenuated Iso-induced airway relaxation, increasing Iso EC50 4.3-fold and reducing maximum relaxation by 12.2%. OxPAPC did not affect adenylyl cyclase (AC) mediated relaxation induced by forskolin. OxPAPC significantly inhibited Iso-induced bronchodilation in murine precision cut lung slices (PCLS). Intranasal OxPAPC pre-challenge significantly inhibited albuterol-mediated suppression of MCh-induced respiratory resistance in BALB/c mice. In cultured human ASM, OxPAPC dose-dependently inhibited Iso- (but not forskolin) induced phosphorylation of the Protein Kinase A substrate VASP by up to 53%. Live cell cADDis assay for intracellular cAMP confirmed that OxPAPC dose-dependently reduces Iso-elicited cAMP generation up to 50%. OxPAPC did not reduce the abundance of cell surface HA-tagged human β2AR in HEK-293 cells. However, inhibition of Protein Kinase C prevented the suppressive effects of OxPAPC on both Iso-induced relaxation of murine tracheal rings, and cAMP signaling in cultured HASM cells. In summary, OxPAPC impairs β2AR agonist induced bronchodilation by PKC-dependent suppression of β2AR-mediated cAMP signaling upstream of AC in ASM cells. These observations reveal a new mechanism for bronchodilator insensitivity.
items.title_en: Oxidized Phosphatidylcholines Inhibit Airway Smooth Muscle β2-Adrenergic Receptors via Protein Kinase C.
items.title_cn: 氧化磷脂酰胆碱通过蛋白激酶 C 抑制气道平滑肌 β2-肾上腺素能受体。
items.abstract_cn: 对哮喘患者 β2 肾上腺素能受体 (β2AR) 不敏感的机制的了解尚不完整。我们发现氧化磷脂酰胆碱 (OxPC) 在肺部的积累与气道高反应性相关，并且 OxPC 诱导人气道平滑肌 (ASM) 细胞收缩和细胞因子合成。在这里，我们测试 OxPC 是否损害 β2AR 激动剂支气管扩张剂反应以及 β2AR 不敏感的相关机制。使用 BALB/c 小鼠的气管环，我们测定了氧化 1-棕榈酰-2-花生四烯酰-sn-甘油-3-磷酸胆碱 (OxPAPC) 对 β2AR 激动剂（异丙肾上腺素 (Iso)）诱导的乙酰甲胆碱 (MCh) 收缩气道松弛的影响。 OxPAPC 预暴露可减弱 Iso 诱导的气道松弛，使 Iso EC50 增加 4.3 倍，最大松弛度降低 12.2%。 OxPAPC 不影响腺苷酸环化酶 (AC) 介导的毛喉素诱导的松弛。 OxPAPC 在小鼠精密切割肺切片 (PCLS) 中显着抑制 Iso 诱导的支气管扩张。鼻内 OxPAPC 攻击前显着抑制沙丁胺醇介导的 BALB/c 小鼠对 MCh 诱导的呼吸阻力的抑制。在培养的人 ASM 中，OxPAPC 剂量依赖性地抑制 Iso（但不是毛喉素）诱导的蛋白激酶 A 底物 VASP 磷酸化高达 53%。对细胞内 cAMP 的活细胞 cADDis 测定证实，OxPAPC 剂量依赖性地减少 Iso 引发的 cAMP 生成高达 50%。 OxPAPC 不会降低 HEK-293 细胞中细胞表面 HA 标记的人 β2AR 的丰度。然而，蛋白激酶 C 的抑制阻止了 OxPAPC 对 Iso 诱导的小鼠气管环松弛和培养的 HASM 细胞中 cAMP 信号传导的抑制作用。总之，OxPAPC 通过 PKC 依赖性抑制 ASM 细胞中 AC 上游 β2AR 介导的 cAMP 信号传导，从而损害 β2AR 激动剂诱导的支气管扩张。这些观察结果揭示了支气管扩张剂不敏感的新机制。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Somatic cancer variants enriched in Alzheimer's disease microglia-like cells drive inflammatory and proliferative states.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: August Yue Huang; Zinan Zhou; Maya Talukdar; Liz Enyenihi; Michael B Miller; Brian Chhouk; Ila Rosen; Mengyue Zheng
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a neurodegenerative condition characterized by microglia-mediated neuroinflammation. Deep (>1,000×) panel sequencing of 311 brain samples revealed enrichment of somatic single-nucleotide variants (sSNVs) in cancer driver genes in AD brains, especially in genes associated with clonal hematopoiesis (CH). These sSNVs were associated with clonal expansion and carried by both microglia-like brain macrophages (MLBMs) in multiple brain regions as well as paired blood, suggesting a likely hematopoietic origin. Single-nucleus RNA sequencing data from 62 additional AD and control brains revealed increased somatic copy number variants (sCNVs) associated with CH in AD MLBMs, whereas single-cell multi-omic analyses demonstrated that sSNV- and sCNV-carrying MLBMs exhibited inflammatory and proliferative transcriptional signatures characteristic of disease-associated microglia. These signatures were recapitulated in induced pluripotent stem cell-derived microglia-like cells with TET2, ASXL1, and DNMT3A variants. These findings suggest that clonal somatic driver variants in MLBMs are enriched in AD, potentially promoting neuroinflammation and neurodegeneration.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Somatic cancer variants enriched in Alzheimer's disease microglia-like cells drive inflammatory and proliferative states.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 阿尔茨海默病小胶质细胞样细胞中富含的体细胞癌变体可驱动炎症和增殖状态。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 阿尔茨海默病（AD）是一种神经退行性疾病，其特征是小胶质细胞介导的神经炎症。对 311 个大脑样本的深度 (>1,000×) 组合测序揭示了 AD 大脑中癌症驱动基因中体细胞单核苷酸变异 (sSNV) 的富集，特别是与克隆造血 (CH) 相关的基因。这些 sSNV 与克隆扩张相关，并由多个大脑区域中的小胶质细胞样脑巨噬细胞 (MLBM) 以及配对血液携带，表明可能是造血起源。来自另外 62 个 AD 和对照大脑的单核 RNA 测序数据显示，AD MLBM 中与 CH 相关的体细胞拷贝数变异 (sCNV) 增加，而单细胞多组学分析表明，携带 sSNV 和 sCNV 的 MLBM 表现出与疾病相关的小胶质细胞特征的炎症和增殖转录特征。这些特征在具有 TET2、ASXL1 和 DNMT3A 变体的诱导多能干细胞衍生的小胶质细胞样细胞中得到重现。这些发现表明，MLBM 中的克隆体细胞驱动变异在 AD 中丰富，可能促进神经炎症和神经退行性变。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Epigenetic control of microglial mitochondrial immunity by KAT7 drives Alzheimer's disease pathogenesis.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Yongqing Liu; Yingzhi Ye; Minghua Fan; Henry Yi Cheng; Shuying Sun; Zhaozhu Qiu
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA)-driven innate immune signaling sustains chronic neuroinflammation in neurological diseases such as Alzheimer's disease (AD), yet how this pathway is regulated in microglia remains poorly understood. Here, we identify the histone acetyltransferase KAT7 (HBO1) as a central epigenetic regulator that links chromatin remodeling to mitochondrial immune activation. KAT7 and its histone mark H3K14ac are elevated in microglia from 5×FAD mice and human AD brains. Integrative transcriptomic and epigenomic analyses reveal that KAT7 activates transcription of cytidine/uridine monophosphate kinase 2 (Cmpk2), a mitochondrial kinase essential for mtDNA synthesis. Loss of KAT7 reduces Cmpk2 expression, impairs mtDNA replication and release, and consequently suppresses cyclic guanosine monophosphate-AMP synthase (cGAS)-stimulator of interferon genes (STING) and NLRP3 signaling. Importantly, both microglia-specific deletion and pharmacological inhibition of KAT7 mitigate cytosolic mtDNA-induced neuroinflammation, decrease β-amyloid burden, restore synaptic plasticity, and improve cognitive function in 5×FAD mice. Together, these findings uncover an epigenetic-mitochondrial axis sustaining microglial pathogenicity and establish KAT7 as a potential therapeutic target for AD.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Epigenetic control of microglial mitochondrial immunity by KAT7 drives Alzheimer's disease pathogenesis.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: KAT7 对小胶质细胞线粒体免疫的表观遗传控制驱动阿尔茨海默病的发病机制。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 线粒体 DNA (mtDNA) 驱动的先天免疫信号在阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 等神经系统疾病中维持慢性神经炎症，但小胶质细胞中如何调节该通路仍知之甚少。在这里，我们将组蛋白乙酰转移酶 KAT7 (HBO1) 确定为将染色质重塑与线粒体免疫激活联系起来的中心表观遗传调节因子。 KAT7 及其组蛋白标记 H3K14ac 在 5×FAD 小鼠和人类 AD 大脑的小胶质细胞中升高。综合转录组和表观基因组分析表明，KAT7 激活胞苷/尿苷单磷酸激酶 2 (Cmpk2) 的转录，Cmpk2 是 mtDNA 合成所必需的线粒体激酶。 KAT7 的缺失会降低 Cmpk2 的表达，损害 mtDNA 的复制和释放，从而抑制环鸟苷单磷酸-AMP 合酶 (cGAS)-干扰素基因 (STING) 的刺激物和 NLRP3 信号传导。重要的是，小胶质细胞特异性缺失和 KAT7 的药理学抑制均可减轻 5×FAD 小鼠胞质 mtDNA 诱导的神经炎症，减少 β-淀粉样蛋白负担，恢复突触可塑性并改善认知功能。总之，这些发现揭示了维持小胶质细胞致病性的表观遗传-线粒体轴，并将 KAT7 确立为 AD 的潜在治疗靶点。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Expression of GPR34 in microglia remains stable in human Alzheimer's disease.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Sophie Seiffer; Jonas Rotter; Jana Brendler; Albert Ricken; Zoe Detzer; Max Braune; Torsten Schöneberg; Angela Schulz
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Microglia are the resident immune cells of the human central nervous system and play key roles in development, homeostasis, and disease. These functions are mediated by a broad repertoire of cell-surface receptors, including G protein-coupled receptors such as the ADP receptor P2Y12 and GPR34, a receptor for lysophosphatidylserine. While GPR34 deficiency has been linked to impaired microglial phagocytosis, its regulation in relation to amyloid-β (Aβ) and tau pathology in Alzheimer's disease (AD) remains unclear. We performed a quantitative analysis of microglial density, morphology, and GPR34 expression in the medial temporal lobe cortex (MTLC) of elderly human body and tissue donors across the AD spectrum. Using fluorescence in situ hybridization and immunolabeling, we analyzed 187,670 microglial cells and correlated microglial parameters with the severity and spatial proximity of Aβ plaques and tau inclusions. In parallel, we analyzed human single-nucleus RNA sequencing data from 236,002 cells to assess GPR34 expression across microglial subtypes, brain regions, and neuropathological stages. Microglial density and overall morphology in the MTLC were largely preserved, independent of local Aβ or hyperphosphorylated tau burdens. Apart from a moderate shortening of microglial processes in the immediate vicinity of Aβ plaques, no consistent pathology-associated morphological changes were detected. GPR34 expression showed pronounced cell-to-cell variability and differed across microglial subtypes and brain regions, but neither expression intensity nor the proportion of GPR34-positive microglia correlated consistently with Braak stage or Thal phase. These findings suggest that GPR34 regulation in human microglia is highly context-dependent and shaped by regional and cellular heterogeneity rather than AD-associated pathology alone.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Expression of GPR34 in microglia remains stable in human Alzheimer's disease.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: GPR34 在小胶质细胞中的表达在人类阿尔茨海默病中保持稳定。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 小胶质细胞是人类中枢神经系统的常驻免疫细胞，在发育、体内平衡和疾病中发挥着关键作用。这些功能由广泛的细胞表面受体介导，包括 G 蛋白偶联受体，例如 ADP 受体 P2Y12 和 GPR34（溶血磷脂酰丝氨酸受体）。虽然 GPR34 缺陷与小胶质细胞吞噬功能受损有关，但其与阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 中淀粉样蛋白-β (Aβ) 和 tau 病理学的关系仍不清楚。我们对整个 AD 谱系的老年人和组织供体的内侧颞叶皮层 (MTLC) 中的小胶质细胞密度、形态和 GPR34 表达进行了定量分析。使用荧光原位杂交和免疫标记，我们分析了 187,670 个小胶质细胞，并将小胶质细胞参数与 Aβ 斑块和 tau 内含物的严重程度和空间接近度相关联。与此同时，我们分析了来自 236,002 个细胞的人类单核 RNA 测序数据，以评估小胶质细胞亚型、大脑区域和神经病理阶段的 GPR34 表达。 MTLC 中的小胶质细胞密度和整体形态在很大程度上得以保留，与局部 Aβ 或过度磷酸化的 tau 蛋白负荷无关。除了 Aβ 斑块附近的小胶质细胞突起适度缩短外，没有检测到一致的病理相关形态变化。 GPR34 表达显示出明显的细胞间变异性，并且在小胶质细胞亚型和脑区域之间存在差异，但表达强度和 GPR34 阳性小胶质细胞的比例与 Braak 阶段或 Thal 阶段均没有一致的相关性。这些发现表明，人类小胶质细胞中的 GPR34 调节高度依赖于环境，并受区域和细胞异质性影响，而不仅仅是与 AD 相关的病理学影响。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Single-cell proteome atlas of aging mouse microglia reveals subpopulation-specific phagoproteome.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Haoran Zhang; Zhen Liu; Bijia Chen; Guangxin Zhang; Longteng Wang; Changsheng Wei; Xiaohui Zhang; Yuxiang Luo
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Microglia are brain-resident immune cells with complex physiological functions. Exploring their proteomic heterogeneity at the single-cell level has remained technically challenging. Here, we optimized a label-free single-cell proteomics (SCP) workflow using Orbitrap Astral mass spectrometry (MS) and applied it to fluorescence-activated cell sorting (FACS)-sorted microglia from the hippocampus and prefrontal cortex of young, middle-aged, and aged mice. This yielded one of the largest SCP datasets to date, comprising 3,085 single cells, with an average of 1,153 protein groups identified per cell. Compared with single-cell transcriptomic data, the SCP dataset showed higher expression completeness and moderate cross-modality correlation. This dataset revealed spatiotemporal proteomic heterogeneity of microglia during aging. Notably, we defined the microglial "phagoproteome," uncovering state-specific phagocytic preferences, and verified these results by imaging. This study underscores the potential of SCP to reveal subpopulation-specific proteomic dynamics and provides a new resource for studying microglial state transitions during aging.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Single-cell proteome atlas of aging mouse microglia reveals subpopulation-specific phagoproteome.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 衰老小鼠小胶质细胞的单细胞蛋白质组图谱揭示了亚群特异性的吞噬蛋白质组。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 小胶质细胞是大脑驻留的免疫细胞，具有复杂的生理功能。在单细胞水平探索它们的蛋白质组异质性在技术上仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们使用 Orbitrap Astral 质谱 (MS) 优化了无标记单细胞蛋白质组 (SCP) 工作流程，并将其应用于来自年轻、中年和老年小鼠海马和前额皮质的荧光激活细胞分选 (FACS) 分选的小胶质细胞。这产生了迄今为止最大的 SCP 数据集之一，包含 3,085 个单细胞，每个细胞平均识别出 1,153 个蛋白质组。与单细胞转录组数据相比，SCP数据集表现出更高的表达完整性和中等的跨模态相关性。该数据集揭示了衰老过程中小胶质细胞的时空蛋白质组异质性。值得注意的是，我们定义了小胶质细胞“吞噬蛋白质组”，揭示了状态特异性的吞噬细胞偏好，并通过成像验证了这些结果。这项研究强调了 SCP 揭示亚群特异性蛋白质组动力学的潜力，并为研究衰老过程中小胶质细胞状态转变提供了新资源。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Nuclear proteome reveals microtubule-associated protein regulating fate and disease.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Florencia Merino; Lucas Miranda; Aparajita Kumar; Yiling Li; Deepak Kumar Sundaramoorthy; Juliane Merl-Pham; Eva-Maria Schentarra; Clemens Steinek
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Cellular differentiation and morphogenesis require the coordination between cytoskeletal remodeling and transcriptional programs, raising the question of how cytoskeletal information is conveyed to the nucleus. Here, we profile the nuclear and cytosolic proteome of human and murine neural stem cells (NSCs) and uncover abundant cytoskeletal proteins in the nucleus, including the microtubule-associated protein 1B (MAP1B), implicated in disease. We find that MAP1B shuttles to the nucleus where it interacts with the BRG1-containing chromatin remodeling complex. MAP1B's nuclear enrichment promotes NSC fate, as opposed to its cytosolic function promoting neuronal differentiation. In vivo, increasing the nuclear/cytosol ratio disrupts neuronal positioning, reminiscent of patients with MAP1B mutations. Mutant human brain organoids show aberrant MAP1B nuclear enrichment, enhanced BRG1 chromatin binding, and neuronal ectopia formation. Our study uncovers a nuclear pool of cytoskeleton-associated proteins, revealing their role in fate regulation during brain development and reshaping our understanding of neurodevelopmental disease etiology.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Nuclear proteome reveals microtubule-associated protein regulating fate and disease.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 核蛋白质组揭示了调节命运和疾病的微管相关蛋白。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 细胞分化和形态发生需要细胞骨架重塑和转录程序之间的协调，这就提出了细胞骨架信息如何传递到细胞核的问题。在这里，我们分析了人和小鼠神经干细胞 (NSC) 的核和胞质蛋白质组，并发现了细胞核中丰富的细胞骨架蛋白，包括与疾病有关的微管相关蛋白 1B (MAP1B)。我们发现 MAP1B 穿梭至细胞核，与含有 BRG1 的染色质重塑复合物相互作用。 MAP1B 的核富集促进 NSC 命运，而不是其促进神经元分化的胞质功能。在体内，增加细胞核/细胞质比例会破坏神经元定位，让人想起 MAP1B 突变的患者。突变的人脑类器官表现出异常的 MAP1B 核富集、增强的 BRG1 染色质结合以及神经元异位形成。我们的研究揭示了细胞骨架相关蛋白的核库，揭示了它们在大脑发育过程中命运调节中的作用，并重塑了我们对神经发育疾病病因学的理解。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Restoring DSCAM expression mitigates neuronal morphology and axon guidance deficits in Down syndrome.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Manasi Agrawal; Nikita Kirkise; Katelyn Rygel; Pabitra K Sahoo; Carly J Vincent; Daniel Joyner; Ricardo Aguilar-Alvarez; Trey R Philipp
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: Down syndrome results from the triplication of human chromosome 21 and is the leading cause of intellectual disability. Down syndrome cell adhesion molecule (DSCAM) is located on human chromosome 21 and is overproduced in Down syndrome. DSCAM is a homophilic cell adhesion molecule, a receptor for netrin-1, and plays a critical role in neural wiring during brain development. Using a Dscam gain-of-function mouse model and human induced pluripotent stem cell-derived cortical neurons, in combination with cellular, molecular, and behavioral approaches, this study aims to understand how DSCAM triplication and its subsequent excessive production contribute to changes in neural development and intellectual disability in Down syndrome. Analysis of morphological parameters revealed impaired neuronal development and loss of netrin-1-mediated axon guidance in mouse hippocampal pyramidal neurons overexpressing DSCAM. DSCAM overexpression also reduces interhemispheric connectivity in vivo. Furthermore, we find that DSCAM overexpression leads to impaired hippocampal-dependent learning and reduced anxiety in adult mice. Down syndrome human induced pluripotent stem cell-derived excitatory pyramidal neurons exhibit a similar phenotype: impaired morphological development and loss of netrin-1-mediated axon guidance. Remarkably, normalization of DSCAM in Down syndrome human induced pluripotent stem cell-derived neurons rescues many of these neuronal phenotypes, including reduced axon length and deficits in axon guidance. This study presents the first comprehensive cellular, molecular, and behavioural evidence that DSCAM is a significant contributor to multiple Down syndrome phenotypes, providing insight into a pathway for treatment. In summary, these results suggest that DSCAM plays an essential role in the development of neurons and neuronal networks, and its overproduction contributes to intellectual disability in Down syndrome.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Restoring DSCAM expression mitigates neuronal morphology and axon guidance deficits in Down syndrome.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 恢复 DSCAM 表达可减轻唐氏综合症的神经元形态和轴突引导缺陷。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 唐氏综合症是由人类 21 号染色体三倍体引起的，是智力障碍的主要原因。唐氏综合症细胞粘附分子 (DSCAM) 位于人类 21 号染色体上，在唐氏综合症中过量产生。 DSCAM 是一种同质细胞粘附分子，是 netrin-1 的受体，在大脑发育过程中的神经线路中发挥着关键作用。本研究利用 Dscam 功能获得性小鼠模型和人类诱导多能干细胞衍生的皮质神经元，结合细胞、分子和行为方法，旨在了解 DSCAM 三倍体及其随后的过度产生如何导致唐氏综合症的神经发育和智力障碍的变化。形态学参数分析显示，过度表达 DSCAM 的小鼠海马锥体神经元神经元发育受损，netrin-1 介导的轴突引导丧失。 DSCAM 过度表达还会降低体内半球间的连接性。此外，我们发现 DSCAM 过度表达会导致成年小鼠海马依赖性学习受损并减少焦虑。唐氏综合症人类诱导多能干细胞来源的兴奋性锥体神经元表现出类似的表型：形态发育受损和 netrin-1 介导的轴突引导丧失。值得注意的是，唐氏综合症人诱导多能干细胞衍生神经元中 DSCAM 的正常化可以挽救许多神经元表型，包括轴突长度缩短和轴突引导缺陷。这项研究首次提供了全面的细胞、分子和行为证据，表明 DSCAM 是多种唐氏综合症表型的重要促成因素，为治疗途径提供了见解。总之，这些结果表明 DSCAM 在神经元和神经元网络的发育中发挥着重要作用，其过量产生会导致唐氏综合症的智力障碍。

核心发现：唐氏综合症是由人类 21 号染色体三倍体引起的，是智力障碍的主要原因。唐氏综合症细胞粘附分子 (DSCAM) 位于人类 21 号染色体上，在唐氏综合症中过量产生。 DSCAM 是一种同质细胞粘附分子，是 netrin-1 的受体，在大脑发育过程中的神经线路中发挥着关键作用。本研究利用 Dscam 功能获得性小鼠模型和人类诱导多能干细胞衍生的皮质神经元，结合细胞、分子和行为方法，旨在了解 DSCAM 三倍体及其随后的过度产生如何导致唐氏综合症的神经发育和智力障碍的变化。形态学参数分析显示，过度表达 DSCAM 的小鼠海马锥体神经元神经元发育受损，netrin-1 介导的轴突引导丧失。 DSCAM 过度表达还会降低体内半球间的连接性。此外，我们发现 DSCAM 过度表达会导致成年小鼠海马依赖性学习受损并减少焦虑。唐氏综合症人类诱导多能干细胞来源的兴奋性锥体神经元表现出类似的表型：形态发育受损和 netrin-1 介导的轴突引导丧失。值得注意的是，唐氏综合症人诱导多能干细胞衍生神经元中 DSCAM 的正常化可以挽救许多神经元表型，包括轴突长度缩短和轴突引导缺陷。这项研究首次提供了全面的细胞、分子和行为证据，表明 DSCAM 是多种唐氏综合症表型的重要促成因素，为治疗途径提供了见解。总之，这些结果表明 DSCAM 在神经元和神经元网络的发育中发挥着重要作用，其过量产生会导致唐氏综合症的智力障碍。

临床/科研意义：建议重点核对研究对象、模型、干预方式、主要终点和局限性，再判断是否纳入综述或选题库。

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Acoustic Analysis of Primary Care Patient-Clinician Conversations to Screen for Cognitive Impairment.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Joseph T Colonel; Jacqueline Becker; Lili Chan; Cara Faherty; Katherine Hackett; Fernando Carnavali; Tielman T Van Vleck; Laura Curtis
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: IMPORTANCE: Cognitive impairment (CI) is often underdetected in primary care due to time and resource constraints. Passive analysis of clinical dialogue may offer an accessible approach for screening. OBJECTIVE: To assess whether audio recordings of patient-physician dialogue during routine primary care visits can be used to identify CI using acoustic speech features and machine learning (ML). DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS: This diagnostic study, conducted from August 2020 through December 2021 among older primary care patients, involved audio recording primary care visits using a microphone and portable device. An external validation cohort was recruited in a separate city to assess reproducibility of findings. Analysis was performed from January 2025 through June 2025. The study was conducted in primary care practices in New York, New York, with additional participants recruited from primary care practices in Chicago, Illinois, for validation. Eligible patients were recruited from primary care practices during routine visits with no prior diagnosis of mild CI or dementia. The study included English-speaking patients aged 55 years and older without documented history of dementia or mild CI. For validation, patients meeting the same eligibility criteria were recruited from primary care practices in Chicago. EXPOSURE: Multiple 30-second speech segments were extracted from recordings. Acoustic features were derived using foundation models (Whisper, HuBERT, wav2vec 2.0) and expert-defined methods (eGeMAPS, prosody). MAIN OUTCOMES AND MEASURES: The primary outcome, CI, was defined as Montreal Cognitive Assessment score 1.0 or more standard deviations below age- and education-adjusted norms. ML classifiers were trained to predict CI status from audio recordings. Area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUROC) and maximum F1 score (Fmax) were calculated for identifying participants with CI. RESULTS: The study included 787 English-speaking patients aged 55 years and older without documented history of dementia or mild CI and an additional 179 patients meeting the same eligibility criteria for validation. In total, 966 participants were recruited, among whom 530 (55%) were female, mean (SD) age was 67.2 (8.1) years, and CI prevalence was 21%. Models using Whisper-derived acoustic features performed best (AUROC, 0.733; 95% CI, 0.714-0.752; Fmax[CI], 0.502; 95% CI, 0.471-0.533). Results generalized to the external site with similar performance (AUROC, 0.727; 95% CI, 0.714-0.740; Fmax[CI], 0.459; 95% CI, 0.441-0.477). Model interpretation identified pitch, timing, and variability features as key predictors. When used for screening, the algorithm achieved positive predictive value of 30.4% (95% CI, 28.7%-32.1%), sensitivity of 68.2% (95% CI, 61.8%-74.6%), and specificity of 63.6% (95% CI, 59.8%-67.4%) on the holdout cohort. CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE: In this diagnostic study, ML models trained on acoustic features from brief clinical conversations identified CI with high accuracy. These findings support the feasibility of passive, speech-based screening during routine primary care.

top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 对初级保健患者与临床医生对话进行声学分析以筛查认知障碍。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 重要性：由于时间和资源的限制，初级保健中的认知障碍 (CI) 常常未被充分发现。临床对话的被动分析可能提供一种易于使用的筛查方法。目的：评估日常初级保健就诊期间患者与医生对话的录音是否可用于通过声学语音特征和机器学习 (ML) 来识别 CI。设计、设置和参与者：这项诊断研究于 2020 年 8 月至 2021 年 12 月在老年初级保健患者中进行，涉及使用麦克风和便携式设备对初级保健就诊进行录音。在另一个城市招募了一个外部验证队列来评估研究结果的可重复性。分析于 2025 年 1 月至 2025 年 6 月期间进行。该研究在纽约州纽约市的初级保健实践中进行，并从伊利诺伊州芝加哥的初级保健实践中招募了更多参与者进行验证。符合条件的患者是在常规就诊期间从初级保健机构招募的，之前没有诊断出轻度 CI 或痴呆。该研究纳入了年龄 55 岁及以上、无痴呆或轻度 CI 病史的英语患者。为了进行验证，从芝加哥的初级保健诊所招募了符合相同资格标准的患者。曝光：从录音中提取了多个 30 秒的语音片段。声学特征是使用基础模型（Whisper、HuBERT、wav2vec 2.0）和专家定义的方法（eGeMAPS、prosody）导出的。主要结果和测量：主要结果 CI 被定义为蒙特利尔认知评估分数低于年龄和教育调整标准 1.0 或更多标准差。机器学习分类器经过训练可以根据录音预测 CI 状态。计算受试者工作特征曲线下面积 (AUROC) 和最大 F1 评分 (Fmax)，以识别患有 CI 的参与者。结果：该研究纳入了 787 名年龄在 55 岁及以上且无痴呆或轻度 CI 病史的英语患者，另外还有 179 名符合相同验证资格标准的患者。总共招募了 966 名参与者……

top_journal_neuroscience.title: Middle Meningeal Artery Embolization With n-Butyl Cyanoacrylate in Patients With Chronic Subdural Hematoma: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.authors: Christopher P Kellner; Ansaar T Rai; Hazem Shoirah; Visish M Srinivasan; Rishi Gupta; Robert M Starke; Fawaz Al-Mufti; Charles C Matouk
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract: IMPORTANCE: Middle meningeal artery embolization (MMAE) is a minimally invasive adjunctive treatment for chronic subdural hematoma (cSDH). The TRUFILL n-butyl cyanoacrylate (n-BCA) liquid embolic system is indicated for embolization of cerebral arteriovenous malformations for presurgical devascularization and may be appropriate for MMAE in patients with cSDH. OBJECTIVE: To evaluate safety and effectiveness of the study device for MMAE plus standard of care vs standard of care alone in patients with cSDH. DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS: The Middle Meningeal Artery Embolization for the Treatment of Subdural Hematomas With TRUFILL n-BCA (MEMBRANE) trial was a prospective, multicenter, open-label, randomized clinical trial conducted from May 27, 2021, to February 6, 2024, at 30 hospitals (28 in the United States and 2 in China). Participants aged 18 to 90 years with symptomatic cSDH and a modified Rankin Scale score of 3 or less were enrolled. INTERVENTIONS: Site physicians determined whether each patient required surgical or nonsurgical management. Participants in the surgical and nonsurgical cohorts were then randomized 1:1 to receive MMAE plus standard of care or standard of care alone. MAIN OUTCOMES AND MEASURES: The primary effectiveness end point was residual or re-accumulation of hematoma (>10 mm; assessed by an independent core laboratory) at 6 months or requiring a surgical procedure on the cSDH within 6 months (conducted as an intention-to-treat analysis). The primary safety end point was incidence of adverse events through 6 months (conducted as an as-treated analysis). RESULTS: A total of 376 participants (188 in MMAE plus standard of care and 188 in standard of care alone) were included. In the MMAE plus standard of care and standard of care alone groups, the mean (SD) age was 70.9 (10.6) and 70.3 (12.1) years, and 45 (23.9%) and 49 (26.1%) were female, respectively. Primary effectiveness end point events occurred in 17 of 146 participants receiving MMAE plus standard of care (11.6%) and 29 of 131 receiving standard of care alone (22.1%) (final estimate of common odds ratio: 0.53 [90% CI, 0.31-0.91]; P = .04), indicating statistically significant benefit for MMAE plus standard of care vs standard of care alone. Adverse events occurred in 130 of 181 participants in the MMAE plus standard of care group (71.8%) and 124 of 190 in the standard of care alone group (65.3%) through 6 months. MMAE plus standard of care treatment was noninferior to standard of care alone based on analysis of good functional outcome at 3 months, as assessed by the modified Rankin Scale. CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE: In this randomized clinical trial, MMAE plus standard of care significantly reduced rates of recurrence and reoperation vs standard of care alone, without a significant increase in adverse events. TRIAL REGISTRATION: ClinicalTrials.gov Identifier, NCT04816591.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_en: Middle Meningeal Artery Embolization With n-Butyl Cyanoacrylate in Patients With Chronic Subdural Hematoma: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
top_journal_neuroscience.title_cn: 氰基丙烯酸正丁酯对慢性硬膜下血肿患者进行脑膜中动脉栓塞：一项随机临床试验。
top_journal_neuroscience.abstract_cn: 重要性：脑膜中动脉栓塞（MMAE）是慢性硬膜下血肿（cSDH）的微创辅助治疗。 TRUFILL 氰基丙烯酸正丁酯 (n-BCA) 液体栓塞系统适用于脑动静脉畸形的术前断流术栓塞，并且可能适用于 cSDH 患者的 MMAE。目的：评估该研究设备对于 cSDH 患者的 MMAE 加标准护理与单独标准护理的安全性和有效性。设计、地点和受试者：使用 TRUFILL n-BCA 进行脑膜中动脉栓塞治疗硬膜下血肿 (MEMBRANE) 试验是一项前瞻性、多中心、开放标签、随机临床试验，于 2021 年 5 月 27 日至 2024 年 2 月 6 日在 30 家医院（美国 28 家，中国 2 家）进行。年龄在 18 岁至 90 岁之间、有 cSDH 症状且改良 Rankin 量表评分为 3 分或以下的参与者被纳入。干预措施：现场医生确定每位患者是否需要手术或非手术治疗。然后，手术组和非手术组的参与者按照 1:1 的比例随机分配接受 MMAE 加标准护理或单独标准护理。主要结局和指标：主要有效性终点是 6 个月时血肿残留或重新累积（>10 毫米；由独立核心实验室评估）或需要在 6 个月内对 cSDH 进行外科手术（作为意向治疗分析进行）。主要安全终点是 6 个月内不良事件的发生率（作为治疗分析进行）。结果：共有 376 名参与者（188 名接受 MMAE 加标准护理，188 名接受单独标准护理）。在 MMAE 加标准护理组和单独标准护理组中，平均 (SD) 年龄分别为 70.9 (10.6) 和 70.3 (12.1) 岁，女性分别为 45 名 (23.9%) 和 49 名 (26.1%)。主要有效性终点事件发生在接受 MMAE 加标准护理的 146 名参与者中的 17 名 (11.6%) 和仅接受标准护理的 131 名参与者中的 29 名 (22.1%)（常见比值比的最终估计：0.53 [90% CI，0.31-0.91]；P = 0.04），表明具有统计学显着性……

核心发现：重要性：脑膜中动脉栓塞（MMAE）是慢性硬膜下血肿（cSDH）的微创辅助治疗。 TRUFILL 氰基丙烯酸正丁酯 (n-BCA) 液体栓塞系统适用于脑动静脉畸形的术前断流术栓塞，并且可能适用于 cSDH 患者的 MMAE。目的：评估该研究设备对于 cSDH 患者的 MMAE 加标准护理与单独标准护理的安全性和有效性。设计、地点和受试者：使用 TRUFILL n-BCA 进行脑膜中动脉栓塞治疗硬膜下血肿 (MEMBRANE) 试验是一项前瞻性、多中心、开放标签、随机临床试验，于 2021 年 5 月 27 日至 2024 年 2 月 6 日在 30 家医院（美国 28 家，中国 2 家）进行。年龄在 18 岁至 90 岁之间、有 cSDH 症状且改良 Rankin 量表评分为 3 分或以下的参与者被纳入。干预措施：现场医生确定每位患者是否需要手术或非手术治疗。然后，手术组和非手术组的参与者按照 1:1 的比例随机分配接受 MMAE 加标准护理或单独标准护理。主要结局和指标：主要有效性终点是 6 个月时血肿残留或重新累积（>10 毫米；由独立核心实验室评估）或需要在 6 个月内对 cSDH 进行外科手术（作为意向治疗分析进行）。主要安全终点是 6 个月内不良事件的发生率（作为治疗分析进行）。结果：共有 376 名参与者（188 名接受 MMAE 加标准护理，188 名接受单独标准护理）。在 MMAE 加标准护理组和单独标准护理组中，平均 (SD) 年龄分别为 70.9 (10.6) 和 70.3 (12.1) 岁，女性分别为 45 名 (23.9%) 和 49 名 (26.1%)。主要有效性终点事件发生在接受 MMAE 加标准护理的 146 名参与者中的 17 名 (11.6%) 和仅接受标准护理的 131 名参与者中的 29 名 (22.1%)（常见比值比的最终估计：0.53 [90% CI，0.31-0.91]；P = 0.04），表明具有统计学显着性……

global_hot_topics.title: Cortical transcriptomic dysregulation in Autism spectrum disorder: A conceptual synthesis.
global_hot_topics.abstract: Autism spectrum disorder (ASD) is a heterogeneous neurodevelopmental condition in which human post-mortem cortical transcriptomic studies have identified recurrent but context-sensitive molecular abnormalities. This narrative review synthesises RNA sequencing (RNA-seq) evidence from ASD cortex and organises recurrent findings into three interacting cortical domains: synaptic/neuronal programmes, immune-glial programmes, and RNA-regulatory processes. Across bulk cortical datasets, the most reproducible signals include relative downregulation of neuronal and synaptic expression programmes together with upregulation of glial-associated and neuroimmune signatures, whereas transcript-level analyses further implicate alternative splicing, microexon dysregulation, differential transcript usage, and isoform-level perturbation. Single-nucleus and related cell-resolved approaches localise these abnormalities to defined neuronal and glial populations, while long-read strategies strengthen inference on transcript structure and isoform complexity. Within this framework, mitochondrial-related findings are best interpreted as a linked bioenergetic component rather than an equally established standalone transcriptomic domain. The review also summarise the principal interpretive constraints of cortical ASD transcriptomics, including region specificity, developmental stage, cohort heterogeneity, cell-type composition, post-mortem tissue quality, and cross-platform comparability.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Cortical transcriptomic dysregulation in Autism spectrum disorder: A conceptual synthesis.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 自闭症谱系障碍中的皮质转录组失调：概念综合。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 自闭症谱系障碍 (ASD) 是一种异质性神经发育疾病，人类死后皮质转录组学研究已发现复发性但背景敏感的分子异常。这篇叙述性综述综合了来自 ASD 皮质的 RNA 测序 (RNA-seq) 证据，并将反复出现的发现整理成三个相互作用的皮质域：突触/神经元程序、免疫神经胶质程序和 RNA 调节过程。在大量皮质数据集中，最可重复的信号包括神经元和突触表达程序的相对下调以及神经胶质相关和神经免疫特征的上调，而转录本水平分析进一步暗示选择性剪接、微外显子失调、差异转录本使用和亚型水平扰动。单核和相关细胞解析方法将这些异常定位于特定的神经元和神经胶质细胞群，而长读策略则加强了对转录本结构和亚型复杂性的推断。在这个框架内，线粒体相关的发现最好被解释为一个相关的生物能量成分，而不是一个同样建立的独立转录组结构域。该综述还总结了皮质 ASD 转录组学的主要解释限制，包括区域特异性、发育阶段、队列异质性、细胞类型组成、死后组织质量和跨平台可比性。

global_hot_topics.title: Side-level versus patient-level evaluation in four-view mammography classification: a comprehensive benchmark on the CMMD dataset.
global_hot_topics.abstract: BACKGROUND: Deep learning for mammographic image classification yields impressive performance metrics, but inconsistent evaluation methodologies-specifically whether results are reported at the independent side level or the bilateral patient level-make cross-study comparisons unreliable. The aim of this study was to quantify, on a single dataset and with a uniform training recipe, how much of the reported performance is determined by evaluation granularity rather than by model architecture. MATERIALS & METHODS: We benchmarked six backbone architectures (ResNet-18, ResNet-50, EfficientNet-B0, DenseNet-121, ConvNeXt-Tiny, ViT-B/16) crossed with three multi-view fusion strategies (concatenation, bilateral asymmetry, cross-view spatial attention) on the biopsy-confirmed Chinese Mammography Database (CMMD; 706 four-view patients), using five-fold patient-level stratified cross-validation. Sixteen configurations completed training for both binary malignancy diagnosis and five-class BI-RADS assessment. We report side-level and patient-level metrics; statistical analyses include 5-fold Wilcoxon signed-rank tests, DeLong's paired AUC test on pooled per-case scores, and bootstrap 95% confidence intervals. RESULTS: Side-level AUC exceeded patient-level AUC by an average of 17.5 percentage points (range 12.7-22.4), an effect that dwarfs the absolute differences observed between CNN backbones (<3 AUC points). DeLong tests resolved approximately half of all CNN-vs-CNN pairwise comparisons at p<0.05 despite small effect sizes, whereas ViT-B/16 underperformed every CNN variant by 8-10% AUC despite having 6-10× more parameters. Patient-level multi-class BI-RADS evaluation under the standard probability-averaging aggregation rule returned a degenerate macro-AUC of exactly 0.000-a property of the metric/aggregation pair, not of the models-and three concrete alternative aggregators are proposed. The extreme patient-level malignancy prevalence intrinsic to this biopsy-confirmed cohort (96.2%) rendered all models unable to identify non-malignant patients at the patient level. CONCLUSION: Reporting methodology, evaluation granularity, and dataset composition are compounding confounds in mammography classification research. Absolute performance numbers reported on CMMD should not be extrapolated to population screening settings, where prevalence is several orders of magnitude lower; studies should report both side-level and patient-level metrics with mutually consistent label/aggregation rules, and characterise performance using confidence intervals or paired statistical tests rather than fold-level Wilcoxon alone. On the CMMD four-view subset, side-level AUC exceeds patient-level AUC by an average of 17.5 percentage points (range 12.7–22.4), an effect that dwarfs the absolute differences observed between CNN backbones (<3 points).The standard patient-level multi-class BI-RADS aggregation rule (label =max, score = mean of probability vectors) returns a degenerate macro-AUC of 0.000 under bilateral asymmetry; this is an artifact of the metric/aggregation pair, not a measurement of model capability. Three concrete alternative aggregators are proposed.Among CNN backbones, pooled-score DeLong tests resolve approximately half of all pairwise comparisons at p<0.05, but absolute AUC differences are small (≤0.030); the 5-fold Wilcoxon test cannot resolve any CNN-vs-CNN pair due to its p=0.0625 floor.ViT-B/16 underperforms all CNN variants by 8–10 % AUC and fails on a partially different patient population (Jaccard 0.29 vs. 0.42 for CNN-CNN pairs), consistent with the data-hungry behavior of vision transformers on small medical datasets.CMMD is a biopsy-confirmed enrichment cohort (96.2 % malignant at the patient level); absolute performance numbers should not be extrapolated to population screening, where prevalence is several orders of magnitude lower.Per-case predictions for all 16 (backbone, fusion) configurations on both tasks are released alongside the manuscript, enabling further methodological work without retraining.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Side-level versus patient-level evaluation in four-view mammography classification: a comprehensive benchmark on the CMMD dataset.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 四视图乳房 X 线摄影分类中的侧面与患者水平评估：CMMD 数据集的综合基准。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 背景：乳腺 X 光图像分类的深度学习产生了令人印象深刻的性能指标，但不一致的评估方法（特别是结果是在独立侧面还是双边患者水平上报告）使得交叉研究比较不可靠。本研究的目的是在单个数据集上并使用统一的训练配方来量化报告的性能有多少是由评估粒度而不是模型架构决定的。材料和方法：我们在活检确认的中国乳房X线摄影数据库（CMMD；706名四视图患者）上对六种主干架构（ResNet-18、ResNet-50、EfficientNet-B0、DenseNet-121、ConvNeXt-Tiny、ViT-B/16）与三种多视图融合策略（串联、双边不对称、跨视图空间注意力）进行了基准测试，使用五倍患者水平分层交叉验证。十六种配置完成了二元恶性肿瘤诊断和五级 BI-RADS 评估的培训。我们报告侧面和患者层面的指标；统计分析包括 5 倍 Wilcoxon 符号秩检验、DeLong 对每个病例​​汇总分数的配对 AUC 检验以及 bootstrap 95% 置信区间。结果：侧面 AUC 平均超过患者水平 AUC 17.5 个百分点（范围 12.7-22.4），这一效应使 CNN 主干之间观察到的绝对差异相形见绌（<3 AUC 点）。 DeLong 测试以 p<0.05 解决了大约一半的 CNN-vs-CNN 成对比较，尽管效果大小较小，而 ViT-B/16 尽管参数增加了 6-10 倍，但 AUC 却比每个 CNN 变体低 8-10%。标准概率平均聚合规则下的患者级多类 BI-RADS 评估返回了恰好为 0.000 的退化宏 AUC（度量/聚合对的属性，而不是模型的属性），并提出了三个具体的替代聚合器。该活检证实的队列固有的极端患者水平恶性肿瘤患病率 (96.2%) 使得所有模型都无法识别患者水平的非恶性患者。结论：报告方法、评估粒度和数据集构成加剧了混淆……

global_hot_topics.title: Pharmacotherapy for online behavioral addictions: a systematic review.
global_hot_topics.authors: Jennifer J Park; Bryan B Chen; Marc N Potenza
global_hot_topics.abstract: INTRODUCTION: In response to the increasing prevalence of online behavioral addictions, researchers have investigated various treatment approaches, including pharmacotherapies. This systematic review aimed to summarize pharmacotherapeutic studies of online behavioral addictions. METHODS: PubMed, MEDLINE, and Embase were searched to identify randomized controlled trials or quasi-experimental studies of pharmacotherapy for online behavioral addictions. Studies were excluded if they only targeted offline behavioral addictions. Study findings were summarized, and the Effective Public Health Practice Project Quality Assessment Tool was used for quality assessment. RESULTS: This systematic review included 20 studies (1016 participants). Bupropion, selective serotonin reuptake inhibitors (SSRIs), and opioid receptor antagonists were most frequently studied and showed preliminary promise in reducing symptom severity. Many pharmacotherapeutic studies addressed co-occurring concerns, such as depression. CONCLUSIONS: Pharmacotherapies for online behavioral addictions appear promising, but the evidence base was limited by small samples, few randomized controlled trials, and short follow-up periods. Given preliminary support for psychotherapy + pharmacotherapy for problematic gaming, future research may evaluate the efficacy of combined treatment for a broader range of online behavioral addictions. Future research should also investigate pharmacotherapies for emerging problematic online behaviors, such as AI-based sexual engagement and problematic cryptocurrency trading. Online behavioral addictions, such as problematic online gaming and gambling, are becoming more common. Researchers have begun studying whether medications can help treat these behaviors, but the evidence has not previously been systematically reviewed. This systematic review identified 20 studies on medications used to treat online behavioral addictions. Some medications, including bupropion, selective serotonin reuptake inhibitors (SSRIs), and opioid receptor antagonists, have shown early promise in reducing symptoms of online behavioral addictions. However, the identified studies have limitations in their design and conduct. Future research on medications for online behavioral addictions should focus on high-quality designs (e.g., using randomized controlled trials), large sample sizes, and long-term follow-up periods to work toward a stronger evidence base.

global_hot_topics.title_cn: 在线行为成瘾的药物治疗：系统评价。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 简介：为了应对日益流行的网络行为成瘾，研究人员研究了各种治疗方法，包括药物疗法。本系统综述旨在总结网络行为成瘾的药物治疗研究。方法：检索 PubMed、MEDLINE 和 Embase，以确定针对网络行为成瘾的药物治疗的随机对照试验或准实验研究。如果研究仅针对线下行为成瘾，则被排除在外。总结研究结果，并采用有效公共卫生实践项目质量评估工具进行质量评估。结果：本系统评价包括 20 项研究（1016 名受试者）。安非他酮、选择性血清素再摄取抑制剂 (SSRI) 和阿片受体拮抗剂是最常研究的药物，并初步显示出在减轻症状严重程度方面的前景。许多药物治疗研究解决了同时出现的问题，例如抑郁症。结论：网络行为成瘾的药物治疗似乎很有希望，但证据基础受到样本小、随机对照试验少和随访期短的限制。鉴于对有问题的游戏的心理治疗+药物治疗的初步支持，未来的研究可能会评估联合治疗对更广泛的网络行为成瘾的疗效。未来的研究还应该研究针对新出现的有问题的在线行为的药物疗法，例如基于人工智能的性行为和有问题的加密货币交易。在线行为成瘾，例如有问题的在线游戏和赌博，正变得越来越普遍。研究人员已经开始研究药物是否可以帮助治疗这些行为，但之前尚未对证据进行系统审查。这项系统综述确定了 20 项关于用于治疗网络行为成瘾的药物的研究。一些药物，包括安非他酮、选择性血清素再摄取抑制剂 (SSRI) 和阿片受体拮抗剂，在减轻网络行为成瘾症状方面已显示出早期前景。然而，已确定的研究存在局限性……

global_hot_topics.title: Poor sleep quality correlates with axial symptoms and mood problems in Parkinson's disease.
global_hot_topics.authors: Seira Taniguchi; Yuta Kajiyama; Emi Shirahata; Yasuyoshi Kimura; Keita Kakuda; Lindun Ge; Kanako Asai; Yoichi Minami
global_hot_topics.abstract: INTRODUCTION: Sleep disturbances and impaired bed mobility are common in Parkinson's disease (PD). We examined whether objectively measured sleep efficiency is associated with axial motor impairment and explored its potential relationship with cognitive and mood profiles. METHODS: Twenty-eight patients with PD underwent single-night EEG-based sleep monitoring and assessment of nocturnal turning. Partial correlations between sleep metrics and scores on motor, cognitive and mood outcomes were analysed, controlling for age, sex and the MDS-UPDRS 3. Family-wise error (FWE) correction was applied within each sleep predictor. RESULTS: Poor sleep efficiency correlated with higher MDS-UPDRS axial subscore (rpartial = -.615) and this association survived stringent correction for multiple comparisons (FWE-p = .018). However, its associations with PIGD and clinically rated freezing of gait did not remain significant after the correction. Exploratory analyses showed the relationships of N1 percentage with mood disturbances and REM latency with self-reported freezing of gait, of which only the relationship of N1 percentage with depression score showed a trend towards significance after the correction (rpartial =.551, FWE-p = .074). CONCLUSION: Poor objective sleep quality was robustly associated with axial motor severity in PD, independent of overall motor burden. Sleep efficiency may represent a clinically accessible marker of shared brainstem-related pathology underlying axial dysfunction.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Poor sleep quality correlates with axial symptoms and mood problems in Parkinson's disease.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: 睡眠质量差与帕金森病的中轴症状和情绪问题相关。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 简介：睡眠障碍和床上活动能力受损在帕金森病 (PD) 中很常见。我们检查了客观测量的睡眠效率是否与轴向运动障碍相关，并探讨了其与认知和情绪状况的潜在关系。方法：28 名 PD 患者接受了单晚基于脑电图的睡眠监测和夜间翻身评估。分析了睡眠指标与运动、认知和情绪结果得分之间的部分相关性，控制了年龄、性别和 MDS-UPDRS 3。在每个睡眠预测因子中应用了家庭误差 (FWE) 校正。结果：睡眠效率差与较高的 MDS-UPDRS 轴向子评分相关（rpartial = -.615），并且这种关联在多重比较的严格校正后仍然存在（FWE-p = .018）。然而，其与 PIGD 和临床评定的步态冻结的关联在校正后并不仍然显着。探索性分析显示 N1 百分比与情绪障碍和 REM 潜伏期与自我报告的步态冻结之间的关系，其中只有 N1 百分比与抑郁评分的关系在校正后显示出显着趋势（rpartial =.551，FWE-p =.074）。结论：客观睡眠质量差与 PD 轴向运动严重程度密切相关，与整体运动负担无关。睡眠效率可能代表轴功能障碍的共同脑干相关病理的临床可访问标志。

global_hot_topics.title: FCGR2B drives immunosuppressive M2 polarization of tumor-associated macrophages via metabolic reprogramming of fatty acid oxidation.
global_hot_topics.authors: Zexu Han; Pei Rao; Fuzhou Wang; Yunying Xing; Xueling Guo; Chao Du; Yingze Wang
global_hot_topics.abstract: FCGR2B, the only inhibitory receptor in the Fcγ receptor family, plays a crucial role in both innate and adaptive immunity. In this study, we observed high FCGR2B expression in tumor-associated macrophages (TAMs) induced by B16 melanoma cells. Knockdown of Fcgr2b in these TAMs suppressed their M2 polarization, as evidenced by decreased expression of immunosuppressive factors, including Arg-1, IL-10, and Fizz1. Furthermore,Fcgr2b knockdown enhanced the phagocytic and antigen-presenting capacities of TAMs, promoted ROS production, and improved their ability to kill melanoma cells in vitro. Transcriptomic analysis revealed thatFcgr2b knockdown predominantly affected key metabolic and signaling pathways, including the JAK-STAT and PPAR-γ pathways. Using classic pharmacological inhibitors (2-DG and C75), we confirmed that FCGR2B interference remodels glycolipid metabolism in TAMs, which is characterized primarily by attenuated fatty acid metabolism, accompanied by increased glycolysis and intracellular free fatty acid accumulation. Moreover, FCGR2B interference downregulated the fatty acid oxidation key enzyme CPT1a by inhibiting the JAK/STAT6/PPAR-γ signaling axis, thereby reducing fatty acid oxidation. Concomitantly, it alleviated endoplasmic reticulum stress via the IRE1/XBP1 pathway, ultimately attenuating the tumor-promoting phenotype of TAMs. Our findings delineate a mechanism by which FCGR2B integrates metabolic and signaling pathways to regulate TAM function, providing a mechanistic basis for targeting FCGR2B in cancer immunotherapy.
global_hot_topics.title_en: FCGR2B drives immunosuppressive M2 polarization of tumor-associated macrophages via metabolic reprogramming of fatty acid oxidation.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: FCGR2B 通过脂肪酸氧化的代谢重编程驱动肿瘤相关巨噬细胞的免疫抑制性 M2 极化。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: FCGR2B 是 Fcγ 受体家族中唯一的抑制性受体，在先天免疫和适应性免疫中发挥着至关重要的作用。在这项研究中，我们观察到 B16 黑色素瘤细胞诱导的肿瘤相关巨噬细胞 (TAM) 中 FCGR2B 高表达。这些 TAM 中 Fcgr2b 的敲低抑制了它们的 M2 极化，免疫抑制因子（包括 Arg-1、IL-10 和 Fizz1）表达减少证明了这一点。此外，Fcgr2b敲低增强了TAM的吞噬和抗原呈递能力，促进ROS的产生，并提高了它们在体外杀死黑色素瘤细胞的能力。转录组分析显示，Fcgr2b 敲低主要影响关键代谢和信号通路，包括 JAK-STAT 和 PPAR-γ 通路。使用经典的药理学抑制剂（2-DG和C75），我们证实FCGR2B干扰重塑了TAM中的糖脂代谢，其主要特征是脂肪酸代谢减弱，伴随着糖酵解和细胞内游离脂肪酸积累的增加。此外，FCGR2B干扰通过抑制JAK/STAT6/PPAR-γ信号轴下调脂肪酸氧化关键酶CPT1a，从而减少脂肪酸氧化。同时，它通过 IRE1/XBP1 途径减轻内质网应激，最终减弱 TAM 的促肿瘤表型。我们的研究结果描绘了 FCGR2B 整合代谢和信号通路来调节 TAM 功能的机制，为癌症免疫治疗中靶向 FCGR2B 提供了机制基础。

核心发现：FCGR2B 是 Fcγ 受体家族中唯一的抑制性受体，在先天免疫和适应性免疫中发挥着至关重要的作用。在这项研究中，我们观察到 B16 黑色素瘤细胞诱导的肿瘤相关巨噬细胞 (TAM) 中 FCGR2B 高表达。这些 TAM 中 Fcgr2b 的敲低抑制了它们的 M2 极化，免疫抑制因子（包括 Arg-1、IL-10 和 Fizz1）表达减少证明了这一点。此外，Fcgr2b敲低增强了TAM的吞噬和抗原呈递能力，促进ROS的产生，并提高了它们在体外杀死黑色素瘤细胞的能力。转录组分析显示，Fcgr2b 敲低主要影响关键代谢和信号通路，包括 JAK-STAT 和 PPAR-γ 通路。使用经典的药理学抑制剂（2-DG和C75），我们证实FCGR2B干扰重塑了TAM中的糖脂代谢，其主要特征是脂肪酸代谢减弱，伴随着糖酵解和细胞内游离脂肪酸积累的增加。此外，FCGR2B干扰通过抑制JAK/STAT6/PPAR-γ信号轴下调脂肪酸氧化关键酶CPT1a，从而减少脂肪酸氧化。同时，它通过 IRE1/XBP1 途径减轻内质网应激，最终减弱 TAM 的促肿瘤表型。我们的研究结果描绘了 FCGR2B 整合代谢和信号通路来调节 TAM 功能的机制，为癌症免疫治疗中靶向 FCGR2B 提供了机制基础。

global_hot_topics.title: Met-Vision reveals coexisting energetic states in tissue macrophages redistributed by inflammation.
global_hot_topics.authors: Adriana Lecourieux; Margot Bardou; Zacarias Garcia; Philippe Bousso
global_hot_topics.abstract: The function of tissue-associated macrophages is tightly linked to their energy metabolism. Yet, the diversity of macrophage metabolic profiles coexisting in tissues at homeostasis or during immune challenges is incompletely understood. Here, we introduce Met-Vision, an imaging-based pipeline for single-cell functional profiling and classification of energy metabolism. Across multiple tissue contexts, we identified that macrophages do not adopt a uniform metabolic profile but typically coexist in four discrete metabolic states with distinct dependence on OXPHOS and metabolic plasticity. Inflammation reconfigured the distribution of macrophage metabolic profiles that remained heterogeneous. Notably, inflammation-derived nitric oxide finely tuned the distribution of macrophage energetic states. These findings challenge the view of homogeneous metabolic activation and reveal a layer of metabolic diversity in tissue at steady state and during inflammation. The ability to stratify macrophage energy metabolic profiles with Met-Vision should help guide the development of metabolism-targeted therapies for inflammatory diseases, cancer, and metabolic disorders.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Met-Vision reveals coexisting energetic states in tissue macrophages redistributed by inflammation.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: Met-Vision 揭示了炎症重新分布的组织巨噬细胞中共存的能量状态。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 组织相关巨噬细胞的功能与其能量代谢密切相关。然而，在稳态或免疫挑战期间共存于组织中的巨噬细胞代谢谱的多样性尚不完全清楚。在这里，我们介绍 Met-Vision，这是一种基于成像的管道，用于单细胞功能分析和能量代谢分类。在多个组织环境中，我们发现巨噬细胞不采用统一的代谢特征，但通常以四种离散的代谢状态共存，并且对 OXPHOS 和代谢可塑性有明显的依赖性。炎症重新配置了保持异质性的巨噬细胞代谢谱的分布。值得注意的是，炎症产生的一氧化氮微调了巨噬细胞能量状态的分布。这些发现挑战了同质代谢激活的观点，并揭示了稳态和炎症期间组织中的一层代谢多样性。利用 Met-Vision 对巨噬细胞能量代谢谱进行分层的能力应有助于指导针对炎症性疾病、癌症和代谢紊乱的代谢靶向疗法的开发。

global_hot_topics.title: Oro-esophageal feeding for tracheostomized patients with severe traumatic brain injury: a randomized controlled trial.
global_hot_topics.authors: Dandan Lv; Hongyan Liu; Jing Zhao; Yang Liu; Qianqian Li; Xing'na Zhao; Liugen Wang; Xi Zeng
global_hot_topics.abstract: BACKGROUND: This study reports the clinical effects of intermittent oro-esophageal tube feeding (IOE) versus nasogastric tube feeding (NGT) on nutritional status, aspiration pneumonia, decannulation, and level of consciousness in tracheostomized patients with severe traumatic brain injury (sTBI). METHODS: A randomized controlled trial was conducted between March 2024 and October 2025 in China and included tracheostomized patients with sTBI. Participants were randomized 1:1 to the intervention and control groups for 28-day interventions. IOE or NGT was used for nutritional supports, respectively. The primary outcome was nutritional status, including hemoglobin, albumin, prealbumin and body mass index. The secondary outcomes included aspiration pneumonia, decannulation, and level of consciousness assessed using the Glasgow Coma Scale (GCS). Generalized linear mixed-effects models, generalized estimating equations, and Cox regression were used for data analyze. RESULTS: A total of 104 participants were included in the analysis. After intervention, significant interaction effects were observed in hemoglobin (β = 5.272, 95% CI: 2.707, 7.837), albumin (β = 3.675, 95% CI: 1.854, 5.496), prealbumin (β = 11.835, 95% CI: 6.623, 17.047), body mass index (β = 1.719, 95% CI: 0.868, 2.569), the GCS (β = 0.981, 95% CI: 0.572, 1.390), and aspiration pneumonia (OR= 0.304, 95% CI: 0.133, 0.693). The Cox model revealed that group significantly influenced the decannulation outcomes [HR (95% CI) =5.556 (3.197, 9.657), p < 0.001]. CONCLUSIONS: In tracheostomized patients with sTBI who received routine treatment, IOE is more conducive to decannulation and the improvement in nutritional status, aspiration pneumonia, and level of consciousness than NGT. CLINICAL TRIAL REGISTRATION: Prospectively registered at ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT06328985, 03/18/2024, clinicaltrials.gov/study/NCT06328985).

global_hot_topics.title_cn: 严重创伤性脑损伤气管切开患者的经口食管喂养：一项随机对照试验。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 背景：本研究报告了间歇性经口食管管饲（IOE）与鼻胃管饲管（NGT）对严重创伤性脑损伤（sTBI）气管切开患者的营养状况、吸入性肺炎、拔管和意识水平的临床影响。方法：2024 年 3 月至 2025 年 10 月在中国进行了一项随机对照试验，纳入气管造口术的 sTBI 患者。参与者按照 1:1 的比例随机分为干预组和对照组，进行为期 28 天的干预。 IOE或NGT分别用于营养支持。主要结果是营养状况，包括血红蛋白、白蛋白、前白蛋白和体重指数。次要结局包括吸入性肺炎、拔管和使用格拉斯哥昏迷量表（GCS）评估的意识水平。使用广义线性混合效应模型、广义估计方程和Cox回归进行数据分析。结果：共有 104 名参与者参与分析。干预后，血红蛋白（β = 5.272，95% CI：2.707，7.837）、白蛋白（β = 3.675，95% CI：1.854，5.496）、前白蛋白（β = 11.835，95% CI：6.623，17.047）、体重指数观察到显着的交互作用（β = 1.719，95% CI：0.868，2.569）、GCS（β = 0.981，95% CI：0.572，1.390）和吸入性肺炎（OR = 0.304，95% CI：0.133，0.693）。 Cox 模型显示该组显着影响拔管结果 [HR (95% CI) =5.556 (3.197, 9.657), p < 0.001]。结论：对于接受常规治疗的sTBI气管切开患者，IOE比NGT更有利于拔管以及营养状况、吸入性肺炎和意识水平的改善。临床试验注册：在 ClinicalTrials.gov 上前瞻性注册（NCT06328985，03/18/2024，clinicaltrials.gov/study/NCT06328985）。

global_hot_topics.title: Local delivery of SBRT and IL-12 to murine PDAC tumors modulates hematopoiesis.
global_hot_topics.authors: Tara G Vrooman; Emily R Quarato; Gary Hannon; Noah A Salama; Maggie L Lesch; Angela L Hughson; Vedika S Chandak; Nataliia Vdovichenko
global_hot_topics.abstract: Standard of care radiotherapy and chemotherapy have shown limited efficacy in pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC). Immunotherapy has emerged as a promising treatment but has been hindered by systemic toxicities. A shift from systemic to localized delivery has reduced adverse effects and improved response rates in various cancers. However, the impact of tumor-targeted therapies on distant tissues, such as the bone marrow, remains underexplored. In a murine model of PDAC, we treated tumors with targeted stereotactic body radiation therapy (SBRT) and intratumoral interleukin-12 mRNA (IL-12). We evaluated tumor, blood, and bone marrow cells for therapy-induced changes over a period of 13 d to 13 months. Our results showed that while SBRT/IL-12 locally eradicated primary tumors, it also induced significant effects in the bone marrow. Early effects included acute lymphopenia in the blood and an immunostimulatory response in the bone marrow, leading to increased hematopoiesis. Long-term effects involved a reduction in hematopoietic stem cells (HSCs) and a shift towards a myeloid lineage, suggesting potential premature aging of the HSC population. These findings highlight the profound impact of localized SBRT/IL-12 therapy on distal bone marrow, emphasizing the need for further investigation into the long-term immunological consequences of localized cancer treatments.
global_hot_topics.title_en: Local delivery of SBRT and IL-12 to murine PDAC tumors modulates hematopoiesis.
global_hot_topics.title_cn: SBRT 和 IL-12 局部递送至小鼠 PDAC 肿瘤可调节造血功能。
global_hot_topics.abstract_cn: 标准放疗和化疗对胰腺导管腺癌 (PDAC) 的疗效有限。免疫疗法已成为一种有前途的治疗方法，但受到全身毒性的阻碍。从全身给药到局部给药的转变减少了各种癌症的不良反应并提高了反应率。然而，肿瘤靶向治疗对骨髓等远处组织的影响仍未得到充分研究。在 PDAC 小鼠模型中，我们采用靶向立体定向放射治疗 (SBRT) 和瘤内白细胞介素 12 mRNA (IL-12) 治疗肿瘤。我们评估了 13 天至 13 个月期间肿瘤、血液和骨髓细胞因治疗引起的变化。我们的结果表明，虽然 SBRT/IL-12 局部根除原发性肿瘤，但它也对骨髓产生显着影响。早期影响包括血液中的急性淋巴细胞减少和骨髓中的免疫刺激反应，导致造血增加。长期影响涉及造血干细胞 (HSC) 的减少和向骨髓谱系的转变，这表明 HSC 群体可能出现过早衰老。这些发现强调了局部 SBRT/IL-12 治疗对远端骨髓的深远影响，强调需要进一步研究局部癌症治疗的长期免疫学后果。

medical_news.title: Cancer patients found a simple way to stay mentally sharp during chemotherapy
medical_news.abstract: “Chemo brain” affects up to 80% of people receiving chemotherapy, making everyday tasks harder. In a new trial, cancer patients who followed a home-based exercise program showed better attention and fewer noticeable cognitive problems than those who received a placebo. Low-dose ibuprofen also improved some cognitive measures, though its effects were less consistent.

medical_news.title: A hidden gene finally explains this rare neurological disorder
medical_news.abstract: Scientists have uncovered a surprising new genetic cause of a rare movement disorder after analyzing nearly 3,000 patients with conditions affecting coordination and muscle control. The team identified mutations in a gene called CD99L2, previously linked only to the immune system, and showed that it plays an essential role in keeping nerve-cell communication running smoothly.

medical_news.title: Scientists found a new Alzheimer’s trigger and a drug that stops it
medical_news.abstract: Researchers have identified a new Alzheimer’s target and created an experimental compound that blocks a damaging process inside brain cells. In mice, the treatment slowed nerve cell loss, reduced Alzheimer’s-related changes, and even appeared to promote healthier aging.
medical_news.title_en: Scientists found a new Alzheimer’s trigger and a drug that stops it

medical_news.abstract_cn: 研究人员发现了阿尔茨海默病的一个新靶点，并创造了一种实验化合物，可以阻止脑细胞内的破坏过程。在小鼠中，这种治疗减缓了神经细胞的损失，减少了与阿尔茨海默病相关的变化，甚至似乎促进了更健康的衰老。

medical_news.title: Scientists discover a surprising cancer link to Alzheimer’s disease
medical_news.abstract: Researchers discovered that mutations linked to blood cancers may help trigger Alzheimer’s disease by creating overly inflammatory immune cells in the brain. The unexpected finding could lead to new blood-based screening methods and potential treatments borrowed from cancer medicine.
medical_news.title_en: Scientists discover a surprising cancer link to Alzheimer’s disease
medical_news.title_cn: 科学家发现癌症与阿尔茨海默病之间存在令人惊讶的联系
medical_news.abstract_cn: 研究人员发现，与血癌相关的突变可能会在大脑中产生过度炎症的免疫细胞，从而引发阿尔茨海默病。这一意外发现可能会带来新的基于血液的筛查方法和借鉴癌症医学的潜在治疗方法。

medical_news.title: Can fasting fight gum disease? Scientists find surprising link
medical_news.abstract: A low-calorie fasting-style diet significantly reduced inflammation linked to gum disease in a small clinical study. The findings suggest that what people eat may influence gum health almost as much as what they do with a toothbrush.
medical_news.title_en: Can fasting fight gum disease? Scientists find surprising link
medical_news.title_cn: 禁食可以对抗牙龈疾病吗？科学家发现令人惊讶的联系
medical_news.abstract_cn: 在一项小型临床研究中，低热量禁食式饮食可显着减少与牙龈疾病相关的炎症。研究结果表明，人们的饮食对牙龈健康的影响几乎与牙刷的影响一样大。

medical_news.title: Stanford scientists regrow lost cartilage and reverse arthritis in major breakthrough
medical_news.abstract: A new treatment that blocks an aging-related protein restored lost cartilage in old mice and helped prevent arthritis after knee injuries. Human cartilage samples showed similar signs of regeneration, raising hopes for a future drug that could repair joints instead of replacing them.
medical_news.title_en: Stanford scientists regrow lost cartilage and reverse arthritis in major breakthrough
medical_news.title_cn: 斯坦福大学科学家取得重大突破，再生失去的软骨并逆转关节炎
medical_news.abstract_cn: 一种阻断与衰老相关的蛋白质的新疗法可以恢复老年小鼠失去的软骨，并有助于预防膝盖受伤后的关节炎。人类软骨样本也显示出类似的再生迹象，这让人们对未来能够修复而不是替代关节的药物产生了希望。

medical_news.title: A classic brain test exposed AI's biggest weakness
medical_news.abstract: Researchers gave top AI models a classic attention test used in psychology and found a major flaw. While the models could correctly name colors in short lists, their performance deteriorated sharply as the task became longer and more complex. Some leading systems fell from over 90% accuracy to nearly complete failure.
medical_news.title_en: A classic brain test exposed AI's biggest weakness
medical_news.title_cn: 经典的大脑测试暴露了人工智能的最大弱点
medical_news.abstract_cn: 研究人员对顶级人工智能模型进行了心理学中使用的经典注意力测试，并发现了一个重大缺陷。虽然模型可以正确命名简短列表中的颜色，但随着任务变得更长、更复杂，它们的性能急剧恶化。一些领先的系统的准确率从超过 90% 下降到几乎完全失败。
